1500400080.english: The more I help Arthur, the sooner the Captain comes to Orca, right?
1500400080.korean: 내가 아서를 많이 도와줄 수록 대장님이 오르카에 오는 날이 빨라질거 아니야?

1500400081.english: That way, the day I see the scene I've been dreaming of with my own two eyes will come sooner, right? Then… Hahahahaha…
1500400081.korean: 그래야 내가 꿈에 그리던 장면을 두 눈으로 보는 날이 빨라질 테고?&n그러면… 후후후후…

1500400082.english: Ahem! It is true that Gamma headed to the northern front of the Alexander Islands. I confirmed via satellite through Aeda that Gamma's flagship was heading to the northern front.
1500400082.korean: 크흠! 감마가 알렉산더 제도의 북부 전선으로 향했다는 건 사실이에요.&n에이다 님을 통해 위성으로 감마의 기함이 북부 전선으로 향한 걸 확인했어요.

1500400083.english: It did stop in North America briefly on the way, but it was strictly for a moment... and there is no reason for that Gamma to stay in North America indefinitely.
1500400083.korean: 도중에 북미에 잠깐 들리긴 했지만, 어디까지나 잠시뿐이었고...&n그 감마가 북미에 계속 남아있을 이유도 없으니까요.

1500400084.english: It would be nice to know exactly where it stopped, but there are limitations to verifying the North American region via satellite due to interference from Epsilon.
1500400084.korean: 정확히 어디에 들렀는지 알 수 있으면 좋겠지만,&n북미 지역은 엡실론의 방해 때문에 위성으로 확인하는 데는 한계가 있어요.

1500400085.english: It is difficult for me to say anything about that opinion right now. She is a child who has very little interest in the world, and I haven't met Epsilon in person yet either.
1500400085.korean: 그 의견에 대해선 당장 뭐라 말씀드리기 어렵네요.&n워낙 세상에 관심이 없는 아이이기도 하고, 저도 아직까지 엡실론을 직접 만나 본 적 없거든요.

1500400086.english: Yes… there was a gathering of the secretary lemonades once back when Gamma forced them to, but Epsilon didn’t attend in person even then.
1500400086.korean: 네… 옛날에 감마의 억지로 비서 레모네이드들의 모임이 한 번 있었는데,&n엡실론은 그때도 직접 참석하지 않았어요.

1500400087.english: Looking back now, I realize that while laziness was part of it, I might have also been intentionally trying to avoid appearing in front of others.
1500400087.korean: 지금 와서 생각해 보면 게으른 것도 있지만, 의도적으로 다른 사람 앞에 나오는 걸 피하려고 했던 걸지도 모르겠어요.

1500400088.english: Considering that they are not actively cooperating with Omega and have never shown any hostility toward our Orca, I don't think it is impossible that they are being invited to join.
1500400088.korean: 합류 권유라면 오메가에게 적극적으로 협조하고 있지 않는 데다, 우리 오르카에게 적대적인 모습을 보여준 적이 없다는 걸 볼 때 가능성이 없는 건 아니라고 생각합니다.

1500400089.english: - According to Merlin's report, Epsilon seemed to frequently exchange information with Gamma, and during the Caracas incident, she knew about Orca's plan but did not try to inform Omega.
1500400089.korean: - 멀린의 보고에 따르면 엡실론은 감마와 자주 정보 교류를 하던 모양이고, 카라카스 사건 때 오르카의 계획을 알면서도 오메가에게 알릴려고 하지 않았다.

1500400090.english: - Epsilon is definitely hostile toward Orca… or maybe I should say she's actually friendly…
1500400090.korean: - 확실히 엡실론은 오르카에 적대적이지… 아니, 오히려 우호적이라고 볼 수 있을지도…

1500400091.english: I think the same as Alpha.

1500400092.english: We don't know if Epsilon is interested in Orca or not. Still, considering our relationship so far, it wouldn't hurt to invite her to join Orca.
1500400092.korean: 엡실론이 오르카에 관심이 있을지 없을지는 알 수 없어요.&n그래도 지금까지의 관계를 생각하면 오르카에 합류하도록 권유해도 손해는 없을 거예요.

1500400093.english: But what's more important than that right now is Cuatro, who took the bypass code to duplicate the lemonade, and…
1500400093.korean: 하지만 지금 그보다 더 중요한 건 레모네이드를 복제할 수 있는 우회 코드를 들고 간 콰트로와…

1500400094.english: Yes, that's right. I don't know if Zeta really took Cuatro with the intention of cloning Lemonade, but at least it wouldn't be for a good purpose.
1500400094.korean: 네, 맞아요. 제타가 정말로 레모네이드를 복제할 목적으로 콰트로를 데려갔는지는 모르겠지만,&n적어도 좋은 곳에 사용할 목적은 아닐 거예요.

1500400098.english: I know what Cuatro did. But still, she is Beta's last remaining sister to me.
1500400098.korean: 콰트로가 저지른 일은 알고 있어요.&n그래도 저에게 있어서 마지막으로 남은 베타 님의 자매니까요.

1500400099.english: I don't know how this will end, but I think I should be the one to bring it to a close. And if possible…
1500400099.korean: 이 일의 마지막이 어떻게 끝날지는 알 수 없지만, 끝맺음만큼은 제가 해야 한다고 생각해요.&n그리고 가능하다면…

1500400100.english: I want to let Cuatro know what freedom is before it's too late... because I know the pain of being bound by being a replica better than anyone.
1500400100.korean: 늦기 전에 콰트로에게도 자유라는 걸 알려주고 싶어요…&n복제품이라는 속박의 고통은 누구보다 제가 잘 알고 있으니까요.

1500400101.english: Thank you for those words alone, Master.

1500400102.english: Lastly, I think we need to investigate Zeta closely.
1500400102.korean: 마지막으로 제타에 관해서는 면밀히 조사할 필요가 있을 것 같아요.

1500400103.english: Following Caracas, there was a recent assassination attempt using a bioroid and a raid using a hologram. Incidents interpreted as movements by Zeta are occurring one after another.
1500400103.korean: 카라카스에 이어서 얼마 전 있었던 바이오로이드를 이용한 암살 시도와 홀로그램을 이용한 습격.&n제타 쪽 움직임으로 해석되는 일들이 연이어 발생하고 있어요.

1500400104.english: At first, I vaguely believed that Zeta was responsible for it, but I’m starting to think that perhaps Zeta didn’t orchestrate the whole thing.
1500400104.korean: 처음에는 막연하게 제타가 일으킨 일이라고 믿었지만, 어쩌면 그 전부가 제타가 꾸민 일이 아닐지도 모른다는 생각이 들어요.

1500400105.english: Yes, it was so different from the Zeta I know. At least during the hologram raid, there was a distinct difference from before.
1500400105.korean: 네, 제가 알고 있는 제타의 행동과는 너무나도 달랐거든요.&n적어도 홀로그램 습격 때만큼은 지금까지와 확연한 차이가 있었어요.

1500400106.english: Up until now, Zeta has maintained a neutral position, acting solely for its own interests and the interest of creating something.
1500400106.korean: 지금까지 제타는 중립적인 위치로, 자신의 이익과 무언가를 창조하는 흥미만을 위해 움직였어요.

1500400107.english: Since Omega had the widest influence among us, they provided Zeta with many resources, and in return, Zeta handed over various technologies and troops to Omega.
1500400107.korean: 오메가는 저희들 중에 세력이 가장 넓었기 때문에 제타에게 많은 자원을 지원했고&n그 교환 조건으로 제타는 오메가에게 다양한 기술과 병력을 넘겨주었죠.

1500400108.english: It is unknown how Zeta will move forward or if they are still maintaining a cooperative relationship with Omega, but it is certain that they are an entity that cannot be ignored in determining future course of action.
1500400108.korean: 앞으로 제타가 어떻게 움직일지 지금도 오메가와 협력 관계를 유지하고 있는지는 미지수이지만,&n앞으로의 행동 방침을 정하는데 무시할 수 없는 존재라는 건 확실해요.

1500400109.english: - The general situation has been sorted out. We must decide on the next course of action.
1500400109.korean: - 대략적인 상황은 정리가 되었다. 다음 행동 방침을 정해야만 한다.

1500400110.english: - As for Gamma and Epsilon, it's probably okay not to worry too much about them for now.
1500400110.korean: - 감마와 엡실론의 경우 지금은 크게 신경 쓰지 않아도 괜찮겠지.

1500400111.english: - All I can think of right now is establishing a new Orca base starting from Caracas and aiming to attack the PECS headquarters where Omega is located...
1500400111.korean: - 지금 생각할 수 있는 건 카라카스를 기점으로 오르카의 새로운 거점을 만들고 오메가가 있는 PECS 본사를 공격하는 걸 목표로 하는 정도인데…

1500400112.english: - Speaking of variables… it is the movement of the Iron Bug that suddenly started to change.
1500400112.korean: - 변수… 라고 하면, 갑자기 변하기 시작한 철충들의 움직임이다.

1500400113.english: - The appearance of Iron Bugs attacking other Iron Bugs in the Iron Tower. And the changes in the movements of the Iron Bugs on the Northern Front as reported by Merlin.
1500400113.korean: - 철의 탑에서 철충을 공격하는 철충의 등장.&n그리고 멀린의 보고에 있었던 북부 전선의 철충들의 움직임의 변화.

1500400114.english: - Is it really a coincidence? Or…

1500400116.english: received a communication from Poseidon! However, this communication line was set up before I left Poseidon in case something happened, and...
1500400116.korean: 포세이돈에서 나한테 통신이 들어왔어!&n그런데 이 통신 회선은 내가 포세이돈에서 나오기 전에 혹시나 있을 일에 대비해서 만든 회선이고…

1500400117.english: This isn't a line normally used! The fact that I'm getting a call through this means something has happened! So...!
1500400117.korean: 일반적으로는 사용하는 회선이 아닌데!&n이걸로 나한테 통신이 들어왔다는 건 무슨 일이 생겼다는 거고! 그러니까…!

1500400118.english: - At my words, Merope took a slow, deep breath and opened her mouth.
1500400118.korean: - 나의 말에 메로페는 천천히 심호흡을 한 뒤 입을 열었다.

1500400119.english: A rescue request came in from the Poseidon base on the northern front.
1500400119.korean: 북부 전선에 있는 포세이돈 기지로부터 구조 요청이 들어왔어.

1500400121.english: I'm so happy that I can keep working like this for everyone!
1500400121.korean: 이렇게 모두를 위해서 계속 일을 할 수 있다는 게 너무나도 기뻐!

1500400122.english: From now on, I’ll keep working forever for everyone.
1500400122.korean: 난 앞으로 영원히 모두를 위해서 계속 일을 할 거야.

1500400124.english: No, I was just wondering if it’s okay now…

1500400125.english: The recent operation really took a lot out of Alpha.
1500400125.korean: 얼마 전에 있었던 작전으로 알파에게는 큰 무리를 시켰으니까.

1500400128.english: Shirayuri, how's the situation on the Omega side since then?
1500400128.korean: 시라유리, 그 뒤로 오메가 쪽의 움직임은 어때?

1500400129.english: Got it. Tell them not to overdo it and to put safety first.
1500400129.korean: 알았어. 무리하지 말고 안전을 최우선으로 행동하라고 전해줘.

1500400130.english: Merlin, Gamma clearly said she was going to the northern front, right?
1500400130.korean: 멀린, 감마는 분명 북부 전선으로 간다고 했는데 맞을까?

1500400133.english: Can't we try to persuade her to join Orca?
1500400133.korean: 오르카에 합류하도록 권유해 볼 수 없을까?

1500400134.english: I've mentioned that before, so does that mean you don't even know their face?
1500400134.korean: 전에도 그런 얘기를 했었는데 그럼 얼굴도 모르는 거야?

1500400135.english: What do you think about Beta?

1500400136.english: Is it Zeta who took that Cuatro…

1500400138.english: I think so too. I’ll try to go easy on them as much as I can.
1500400138.korean: 나도 그렇게 생각해. 최대한 선처해 볼게.

1500400139.english: Are you saying that someone on Zeta's side might be acting on their own?
1500400139.korean: 제타 쪽의 누군가가 독단적으로 움직이고 있을지도 모른단 얘기야?

1500400140.english: First, focus on setting up Orca's base in South America.
1500400140.korean: 우선 남미에 오르카의 거점을 만드는데 집중해줘.

1500400141.english: And about the next action goal…

1500400143.english: Merope, calm down. I already know something serious happened.
1500400143.korean: 메로페 진정해. 큰일이 났다는 건 알았으니까.

1500600001.english: - Upon receiving word from Merope that a distress call had come from Poseidon, I assembled a unit ready to depart immediately and hurriedly headed to the northern front.
1500600001.korean: - 메로페에게 포세이돈으로부터 구조 요청이 왔다는 걸 전달 받은 나는 당장 출발할 수 있는 부대를 편성해 서둘러 북부 전선으로 향했다.

1500600003.english: Master… Yeah, I’m fine. Thank you for worrying about me.
1500600003.korean: 주인님… 응, 난 괜찮아.&n걱정해 줘서 고마워.

1500600004.english: I was shocked and flustered when I received the rescue request, but I'm okay now.
1500600004.korean: 구조 요청 연락을 받았을 때는 충격을 받아서 당황했지만, 이젠 괜찮아.

1500600005.english: I know Gamma better than anyone. Do you know how long I've been cleaning up after her!
1500600005.korean: 감마 님에 대해서는 누구보다 잘 알고 있는걸.&n내가 얼마나 오랫동안 그 사람 뒷처리를 했는데!

1500600006.english: Actually, it’s unnecessary worry, and once you get there, you might say nothing happened!
1500600006.korean: 사실 괜한 걱정이고, 막상 도착하면 아무 일도 없었다고 할지 몰라!

1500600007.english: Maybe she sent the help request by mistake! Yeah, that's entirely possible for Rhode.
1500600007.korean: 어쩌면 실수로 도움 요청을 보낸 걸지도 모르고!&n응, 로데라면 충분히 그럴 수 있어.

1500600008.english: - Unlike her composed tone, Meropé's hands were trembling, and she seemed to have difficulty concealing her expression of guilt.
1500600008.korean: - 태연한 어투와 달리 메로페의 손은 떨리고 있었고, 죄책감에 짓눌린 표정을 감추기 힘들어 보였다.

1500600009.english: - I approached Meropé and gently stroked her head.
1500600009.korean: - 나는 메로페에게 다가가 머리를 살짝 쓰다듬었다.

1500600011.english: - I couldn't shake the feeling that Merope was once again trying to shoulder an unbearable burden all alone.
1500600011.korean: - 메로페가 또다시 감당하기 힘든 짐을 홀로 짊어지려 한다는 느낌을 떨칠 수 없었다.

1500600012.english: - Because she crossed over to Orca… if she hadn’t left and had stayed there…
1500600012.korean: - 자신이 오르카로 넘어왔기 때문에… 만약 떠나지 않고 그곳에 계속 남았더라면…

1500600013.english: - Thinking that what happened at Poseidon could have been prevented.
1500600013.korean: - 포세이돈에서 벌어진 일을 막을 수 있지 않았을까 하고.

1500600014.english: … Hehehe, as expected, Master is exactly Master Alcyone told me about.
1500600014.korean: …에헤헤, 역시 주인님은 알키오네 언니가 얘기해 준 그대로의 주인님이야.

1500600016.english: Because you granted my request to accept Poseidon's rescue call. At the emergency meeting, there was even a suggestion to decline the rescue request...
1500600016.korean: 포세이돈의 구조 요청을 받아달라는 내 부탁을 들어줘서.&n긴급 회의에서는 구조 요청을 거절하자는 의견도 있었는데…

1500600018.english: - ...Recent changes in the movements of the Iron Bug, and Poseidon's distress call delivered in response.
1500600018.korean: - ...최근에 발생한 철충들의 움직임의 변화, 그에 맞춰 전달된 포세이돈의 구조 요청.

1500600019.english: - Perhaps something massive is being orchestrated somewhere I don't know about.
1500600019.korean: - 어쩌면 내가 모르는 곳에서 엄청난 일이 꾸며지고 있을지도 모른다.

1500600020.english: - I became convinced that I absolutely had to personally verify as much information as possible, if only to prepare for the future.
1500600020.korean: - 앞으로의 일을 대비하기 위해서라도 최대한 많은 정보를 직접 확인하지 않으면 안 되겠다는 확신이 들어섰다.

1500600021.english: - You must not miss even the smallest thing right now.
1500600021.korean: - 지금은 작은 무언가라도 놓치면 안 된다.

1500600022.english: - Besides, there is still money to return to Gamma.
1500600022.korean: - 게다가 감마에게는 아직 돌려줘야할 거스름이 있으니까.

1500600023.english: - Checking to ensure there are no issues with the expedition preparations. Merlin and Dragon were seen conversing in the distance.
1500600023.korean: - 원정 준비에 문제가 없는지 확인하는 중.&n멀리서 멀린과 용이 대화하고 있는 모습이 보였다.

1500600024.english: Ah, Arthur! I was discussing with Captain Invincible Dragon how we might be able to persuade Captain Gamma to come over to Orca's side when we ran into her.
1500600024.korean: 앗, 아서!&n무용 대장님이랑 같이 감마 대장님을 만났을 때, 어떻게 하면 오르카로 전향하시도록 설득할 수 있을지 논의하고 있었어.

1500600025.english: Haha, but I can hardly think of a decent way to persuade you other than fighting and winning by force.
1500600025.korean: 후후, 하지만 싸워서 힘으로 이긴다는 방법 말고는 괜찮은 설득 방법이 좀처럼 떠오르지 않소.

1500600026.english: - I also can't think of a way to get Gamma to join Orca other than fighting and subduing her by force.
1500600026.korean: - 나 역시 싸워서 힘으로 굴복시키는 것 말고 감마를 오르카에 합류 시킬 방법이 떠오르지 않는다.

1500600027.english: As for another method… something that could satisfy the Captain’s fighting instinct… like a battle that resembles combat, but isn’t a bloody one, but one where something else flows…?
1500600027.korean: 다른 방법이라면… 대장님의 전투 욕구를 충족시킬 만한 게...&n전투와 비슷하면서도 피가 흐르는 전투가 아닌 다른 게 흐르는 전투라던가…?

1500600028.english: Huh? What do you mean by worried?

1500600029.english: - I told Meropé that she was worried about Gamma.
1500600029.korean: - 나는 메로페가 감마를 걱정하고 있다는 걸 이야기했다.

1500600030.english: Hahaha, just like any other kid! To think you know everything about the Captain just because you've been together for a few years!
1500600030.korean: 후후후, 역시 꼬맹이는 꼬맹이군!&n고작 수 년을 같이 있었다는 걸로 대장님의 모든 걸 안다고 생각하다니!

1500600031.english: As for me, I’ve been thinking about the Captain and doing image training for decades!
1500600031.korean: 나로 말할 것 같으면 수십 년 동안 대장님을 줄곧 생각하며 이미지 트레이닝을 했지!

1500600032.english: To me, the Captain's image is always the strongest! She's an absolute powerhouse who never loses to anyone!
1500600032.korean: 나에게 있어서 대장님의 이미지는 언제나 최강!&n그 누구에게도 지지 않는 절대 강자라구!

1500600033.english: So there is absolutely no need to worry! By now, I don't know what kind of crisis came your way, but I'm sure you've blown it all away.
1500600033.korean: 그러니까 걱정할 필요는 전혀 없어!&n지금쯤이면 무슨 위기가 찾아왔는지 몰라도 전부 날려버리셨을걸?

1500600034.english: Ah! Of course, Arthur is an exception! In the image in my head, Arthur is always on top of Gamma, so don't worry!
1500600034.korean: 아! 물론 아서는 예외야!&n내 머릿속 이미지에서는 언제나 감마 님 위에 아서가 올라타 있으니까, 걱정 마!

1500600035.english: - What on earth is this image...

1500600036.english: - This guy... as time goes on, she seems to be looking more and more like Talonfeather.
1500600036.korean: - 이 녀석... 가면 갈 수록 탈론페더를 너무 닮아가는 것 같은데?

1500600037.english: I share the same opinion regarding that.
1500600037.korean: 그 의견에 대해서는 소관도 같은 생각이오.

1500600038.english: Although we are enemies now, when I think about the times we fought together, it is hard to imagine Gamma being defeated by anyone.
1500600038.korean: 지금은 적대 관계지만, 함께 싸워온 시절의 모습을 생각하면 감마가 누군가에게 패배한다는 건 상상하기가 어렵소.

1500600039.english: Hahaha, of course, I mean likewise, other than my lord.
1500600039.korean: 후후, 물론 마찬가지로 주군 이외에 말이오.

1500600040.english: Or are you saying that you can imagine Gamma losing to someone, My Lord?
1500600040.korean: 아니면 주군은 감마가 누군가에게 진다는 게 상상이 된단 말이오?

1500600041.english: - Hmm... so that Gamma is defeated...

1500600042.english: - Gamma, who changes the terrain with bare hands, leaps hundreds of meters, and calmly blocks missiles?
1500600042.korean: - 맨손으로 지형을 바꾸고 수백 미터를 도약하며 미사일도 태연하게 막아내는 감마가?

1500600043.english: That is the case. Actually, I am more worried that she might pick a fight with us when she meets Gamma.
1500600043.korean: 그런 거요.&n오히려 감마를 만났을 때 우리에게 싸움을 걸지 않을까, 소관은 그것이 더 걱정이오.

1500600044.english: - ...It’s so scary that it really seems like that might be the case.
1500600044.korean: - ...정말로 그럴 것 같다는 게 너무 무섭다.

1500600045.english: Oh, I was curious too! What were Captain Dance and Captain Gamma like back then?
1500600045.korean: 앗, 저도 궁금했어요! 그 시절 무용 대장님과 감마 대장님은 어땠나요?

1500600046.english: You might find this surprising, but aside from the first time we met and the last time, our relationship wasn't particularly bad. In fact, it would be more accurate to say it was good.
1500600046.korean: 의외라 생각할지도 모르겠소만, 처음 만났을 때와 마지막을 제외하면 사이가 썩 나쁘진 않았소.&n오히려 좋았다고 보는 게 맞을 거요.

1500600047.english: We often fought enemies back-to-back or joined in sparring sessions disguised as Gamma training.
1500600047.korean: 서로의 등을 맞대고 적과 싸우거나 감마의 수련을 방자한 대련에 자주 어울려주었으니 말이오.

1500600048.english: - I can't really imagine a dragon and a gamma fighting back-to-back or sparring with each other.
1500600048.korean: - 용과 감마가 등을 맞대고 함께 싸우거나 서로 대련하는 모습… 잘 상상이 안간다.

1500600049.english: The first time I met Gamma was when Black River, to which I belonged, formed an alliance with PECS and waged the Second Coalition War against Saman Industries.
1500600049.korean: 감마와 처음으로 만난 건, 소관이 속한 블랙 리버가 PECS와 동맹을 맺고 삼안 산업을 상대로 2차 연합 전쟁을 벌였을 때의 일이오.

1500600051.english: I'll just say this one thing.

1500600052.english: Even if something happens to Poseidon, it's absolutely not your fault.
1500600052.korean: 혹시나 포세이돈에 무슨 일이 일어났다고 해도 절대 네 잘못이 아니야.

1500600053.english: It's a request from Merope, the adorable pride of the Pleiades, so of course I have to say yes.
1500600053.korean: 플레이아데스의 자랑 귀염둥이 메로페의 부탁인데 당연히 들어줘야지

1500600054.english: What are the two people doing here?

1500600055.english: ...Merlin seems fine, are you not worried?
1500600055.korean: ...멀린은 아무렇지도 않아 보이는데 걱정되지 않는 거야?

1500600057.english: Come to think of it, I haven't had the chance to ask until now.

1500600058.english: How was your relationship with Gamma back in the day? I don't really think you guys got along well.
1500600058.korean: 용은 옛날에 감마와 어땠어? 딱히 사이가 좋았을 것 같진 않은데.

1500700001.english: Several months after the outbreak of the Second Coalition War.

1500700002.english: The majority of people predicted that the Allied Forces, having secured naval supremacy by utilizing the technological prowess of Black River—a company with a long history in the military industry—and the warships produced by PECS’s Poseidon, would gain the upper hand in the war. In fact, I believe the atmosphere at the beginning of the war was indeed heading in that direction.
1500700002.korean: 오랫동안 군사 업계로 활동한 블랙 리버, 그리고 PECS의 포세이돈 사에서 생산된 군함의 기술력을 이용해 제해권을 장악한 연합군이, 전쟁의 우위를 가져갈 거라 예측하는 사람들이 대다수였소. &n실제로도 전쟁 초기에는 그러한 방향으로 흘러가는 분위기였다고 생각하오.

1500700003.english: However, the tactical modules of Saman Industries' bioroids were upgraded day by day, and they demonstrated combat capabilities equal to... no, even greater than, those of the Black River bioroids built for combat.
1500700003.korean: 하지만 삼안 산업 바이오로이드들의 전술 모듈은 날이 가면 갈수록 업그레이드 되었고, 전투용으로 제작된 블랙 리버의 바이오로이드와 호각... 아니, 그 이상의 전투력을 보여주었소.

1500700004.english: Furthermore, Saman Industries is a company with solid bioroid production capabilities, occupying over 50% of the global market. Ultimately, no one can predict how the Second Alliance War will unfold.
1500700004.korean: 게다가 삼안 산업은 세계 50% 이상의 시장을 점유할 정도로 굳건한 바이오로이드 생산력을 가진 기업, 결국 2차 연합 전쟁은 어떻게 흘러갈지 아무도 예측할 수 없게 되었소.

1500700005.english: As a breakthrough in the situation at the time, the Allied Forces utilized the powerful warships of Poseidon Corporation to execute a large-scale amphibious operation to destroy Saman Industries' weak naval power and attack key strongholds.
1500700005.korean: 연합군은 당시 상황의 돌파구로써 포세이돈 사가 가진 막강한 군함을 이용하여,&n삼안 산업의 취약한 해상 전력을 파훼하고 주요 거점을 공략하는 대규모 상륙 작전을 실행하였소.

1500700006.english: But… as history tells us… things never go as planned…
1500700006.korean: 하지만… 역사가 그러하듯…&n모든 일은 뜻대로 되지 않는 법이었소…

1500700009.english: It was just a little further ahead!!

1500700010.english: If only I were a little further ahead, I could have killed that bastard with my own hands!!
1500700010.korean: 앞으로 조금이면, 그 자식을 내 손으로 죽여버릴 수 있었는데!!

1500700011.english: Mermaid Project'? Saman Industries' naval unit? Where on earth did those vermin suddenly pop up from?!
1500700011.korean: 머메이드 프로젝트'? 삼안 산업의 해군 부대?&n대체 어디서 갑자기 튀어나온 거야, 저 버러지 잡것들은!!

1500700012.english: The Hokkaido landing operation failed because of that useless Bioroid?
1500700012.korean: 저딴 되도 않는 바이오로이드 때문에 홋카이도 상륙 작전이 실패했다고?

1500700013.english: How much manpower and money did we pour into this operation, and now you're telling me to just meekly accept this result!?
1500700013.korean: 이 작전에 쏟은 병력과 자금이 몇인데 지금 나더러 이 결과를 순순히 받아들이라는 거야!?

1500700016.english: Try to make an excuse, Allied Commander!

1500700017.english: ...A variable arose due to the appearance of naval forces that were not in our prior intelligence. This time, the other side was simply slightly superior, but our forces did their best as usual.
1500700017.korean: ...사전 정보에 없었던 해상 전력의 출현으로 변수가 발생하였소.&n이번에는 저쪽이 좀 더 우수했을 뿐으로 아군은 평소와 같이 최선을 다했소.

1500700020.english: Did you just babble that you 'did your best'?

1500700021.english: If you hadn't ignored my orders and had pushed ahead with the landing in the first place, everything would have been resolved, wouldn't it?
1500700021.korean: 애초에 네가 내 명령을 무시하지 않고 상륙을 강행했으면, 전부 해결 됐을 거 아니야!

1500700022.english: Our casualties were already severe before we even landed! If we had forced the landing in that condition, we would have been helpless against the enemy's ground forces!
1500700022.korean: 상륙하기 전에 이미 아군의 피해는 막심했소!&n그런 상태로 상륙을 강행했다간 적들의 지상 병력에 속수무책으로 당했을 거요!

1500700023.korean: 그딴 건 내 알 바 아니야!

1500700024.english: That was an 'order'!! Your mission is to lead the Allied forces and land the troops!
1500700024.korean: 그건 '명령'이었어!!&n네 임무는 연합군을 이끌고 부대를 상륙 시키는 거라고!

1500700025.english: A mere tin doll like you dare disobey my master's orders? Do you think I spent vast resources creating you just to hear that kind of talk?
1500700025.korean: 한낱 깡통 인형 주제에 감히 주인인 내 명령을 거역해?&n내가 그딴 소리를 들으려고 막대한 자원을 들여 널 만든 줄 알아?

1500700026.english: Hahaha! Come to think of it, I was foolish to trust a failure that couldn't even surpass Labiata.
1500700026.korean: 아하하! 하긴, 라비아타도 뛰어넘지 못 한 실패작 따위를 믿은 내가 어리석었지.

1500700028.english: Hahaha, a failure... that's too harsh, Angel. The Commander is doing better than anyone, you know?
1500700028.korean: 크하하하, 실패작이라니... 말이 너무 심하잖아, 앙헬.&n사령관은 누구보다 잘 하고 있다고?

1500700029.english: Try to trust your own work a little more, just like me.
1500700029.korean: 좀 더 자신이 만든 작품을 믿어 보라고, 나처럼 말이야.

1500700032.english: Hehe, what business do you have here? Well, I just came to take a good look at you, the precious one, after getting properly beaten down. And while I'm at it, I have a guy to introduce to the Allied Commander.
1500700032.korean: 크크, 무슨 볼일이긴. 그야 제대로 한 방 먹은 귀한 네 모습 구경이나 하러 왔지.&n겸사겸사 연합군 사령관에게 소개해 줄 녀석도 있고.

1500700033.english: Hey, you know a lot of your troops have been deployed in this operation, don't you?
1500700033.korean: 이봐, 이번 작전에 네놈의 병력도 다수 투입된 걸 모르는 건 아니겠지?

1500700034.english: Of course I know that. But so what? A few troops? We can just rebuild them, right?
1500700034.korean: 그야, 잘 알고 있지.&n근데 그게 뭐 어쨌다는 거지? 그까짓 병력쯤이야, 다시 만들면 그만이잖아?

1500700035.english: I actually like it because things are getting more interesting. It wouldn't be fun if it ended too blandly!
1500700035.korean: 나는 오히려 일이 더 재밌게 흘러가게 돼서 좋다고?&n너무 싱겁게 끝나면 재미가 없으니까!

1500700036.english: Was it called the 'Mermaid Project'? Saman Industries came up with something pretty interesting. Now that we can finally have a proper naval battle with Saman! Hahaha! I just can't stop getting excited!
1500700036.korean: 머메이드 프로젝트'라고 그랬나? 삼안 산업이 꽤나 흥미로운 걸 만들었어.&n마침내 삼안과 제대로 된 해상 전투를 할 수 있게 됐으니! 크크크! 흥분이 가시질 않는걸?

1500700037.english: You crazy bastard in this war…!

1500700038.english: Hehe, thanks. That's the best compliment.

1500700040.english: Wow, it's been a long time, Allied Commander! This operation was truly disappointing!
1500700040.korean: 이야, 이것 참 오랜만이군, 연합군 사령관!&n이번 작전은 참으로 아쉬웠다!

1500700041.english: I fully agree with Angel's opinion that it would have been better to push ahead with the landing. Because then, we could have fully enjoyed the scenes of blood and gore flying around!
1500700041.korean: 나로서도 상륙을 강행했으면 좋았을 거라는 앙헬의 의견에 전적으로 동의하는 입장이라서 말이야.&n그랬다면 피와 살이 튀기는 장면을 맘껏 즐길 수 있었을 테니까!

1500700042.english: Chairman Alexander… I heard you have business with me. Who would you like to introduce?
1500700042.korean: 알렉산드로스 회장… 소관에게 볼 일이 있다고 들었소.&n소개해 줄 인물은 누구요?

1500700045.english: Let me introduce you. This is Lemonade Gamma, my secretary and the future Deputy Commander of the Allied Forces.
1500700045.korean: 소개하지.&n내 비서이자 앞으로 연합군의 부사령관을 맡을 '레모네이드 감마'다.

1500700047.english: Are you Dragon who is serving as the commander of the Allied Forces?
1500700047.korean: 네가 연합군의 사령관을 맡고 있다는 용인가?

1500700048.english: Hmm, now that I see it in person, it doesn't look as impressive as I heard.
1500700048.korean: 흠, 실제로 보니까 듣던 것만큼 대단해 보이지는 않는데?

1500700051.english: Oh? You're pretty good for your looks. To think you blocked it without even changing your expression.
1500700051.korean: 호오? 보기보다는 제법이잖아?&n표정 하나 안 바뀌고 막아내다니.

1500700052.english: Besides, isn't there a single scratch? I attacked with all my might... Haha! You're beyond my imagination! Fine, this is exactly the Allied commander I've been dreaming of!
1500700052.korean: 게다가 긁힌 상처하나 없나? 나름 진심을 담아 공격했는데...&n하핫! 상상 이상이야! 좋아, 이래야 내가 상상해왔던 연합군의 사령관이지!

1500700053.english: What on earth are you doing! To attack out of the blue!
1500700053.korean: 이게 대체 무슨 짓이오! 느닷없이 공격하다니!

1500700054.english: Why are you getting so worked up? We just exchanged a quick greeting, didn't we?
1500700054.korean: 뭘, 그렇게 열 내고 그래?&n가벼운 인사를 했을 뿐이잖아?

1500700055.english: Shouldn't I at least know what level the Allied Commander I'm going to serve is?
1500700055.korean: 앞으로 내가 모시게 될 연합군의 사령관이란 녀석이 어떤 수준인지 정돈 알아야 하지 않겠어?

1500700056.english: Do you really think attacking your own allies is acceptable just because of that!?
1500700056.korean: 그렇다고 해서 같은 아군을 공격하는 게 용납되는 일이라 생각하는 거요!?

1500700057.english: Of course! Now that we're on the same side, we must strictly distinguish between superiors and subordinates to avoid any complaints... As someone in a higher position, you should know that better than anyone, right?
1500700057.korean: 당연! 같은 아군이 된 이상 위아래는 철저하게 구분 지어야 군말이 없다는 거… 상부의 자리인 네가 더 잘 알 거 아냐?

1500700058.english: have absolutely no intention of serving someone weaker than me as a commander.
1500700058.korean: 나는 나보다 약한 녀석을 사령관으로 받들어 모실 생각이 추호도 없어서 말이야.

1500700061.english: Hahaha! Right! That's exactly it! I wanted to see that face!
1500700061.korean: 하하핫! 그래! 바로 그거야!&n그 얼굴이 보고 싶었어!

1500700062.english: I've seen you fight countless times. It gives me goosebumps all over my body.
1500700062.korean: 네가 싸우는 모습은 수도 없이 봐 왔어.&n전율로 온몸에 소름이 돋을 정도야.

1500700063.english: More belligerent than anyone! More enjoyment of fighting than anyone! I mean the way she cuts down enemies without even a flicker of expression in the face of any unexpected situation!
1500700063.korean: 누구보다 호전적이고! 누구보다 싸움을 즐기는!&n그 어떤 돌발 상황에도 표정 하나 바뀌지 않고 적들을 베어 넘기는 모습을 말이야!

1500700064.english: That overwhelming appearance is truly amazing. I fell in love at first sight! It’s good enough to call it love!
1500700064.korean: 그 압도적인 모습은 정말이지 멋져.&n한눈에 반해버렸지! 사랑이라고 해도 좋을 정도야!

1500700065.english: So I thought! The reason I was born into this world! Maybe it's to fight you!
1500700065.korean: 그래서 생각했지! 내가 이 세상에 태어난 이유는!&n너와 싸우기 위해서 일지도 모른다고 말이야!

1500700067.english: Haha, sorry, but you're partly to blame for this, too! It is none other than your very existence that made me this worked!
1500700067.korean: 하하, 미안하지만 이건 네게도 일부 책임이 있다고?&n날 이렇게 흥분하게 만든 건 다름 아닌 너의 존재니까!

1500700068.english: Then, let's have a proper showdown to see who's the superior one...! Please don't disappoint me... Dragon!
1500700068.korean: 그럼, 누가 더 위인지 제대로 승부를 내 보자고...!&n부디 날 실망시키지 말아 달라고… 용!

1500700069.english: That was my first meeting with Gamma.

1500700071.english: However, aside from this time, there were no major problems. Of course, there were some rather intense fights, but they were strictly within the realm of sparring.
1500700071.korean: 하지만 이때를 제외하면 큰 문제는 없었소.&n물론 다소 격했던 싸움은 있었지만, 어디까지나 대련 영역에서의 싸움이었으니 말이오.

1500700072.english: Even as Gamma enjoyed fighting against me, I believe she equally enjoyed fighting alongside me as well.
1500700072.korean: 감마는 소관과 싸우는 걸 즐기면서도 한편으로는 함께 싸우는 것 또한 즐겼을 거요.

1500700073.english: After that, as everyone knows, the Iron Bug invasion occurred, and although everyone, including I, fought with all their might, humanity eventually began to walk the path of destruction due to the Hypnos disease…
1500700073.korean: 그 후로는 모두가 알다시피 철충의 침공이 일어났고 소관을 포함한 모두가 전력을 다해 싸웠지만,&n휩노스 병에 의해 결국 인류는 멸망의 길을 걷기 시작했소…

1500700074.english: As Hypnos disease began to spread, the magistrate suggested that Gamma join Amina Jones. However, Gamma refused.
1500700074.korean: 휩노스 병이 퍼지기 시작하자 소관은 감마에게 함께 아미나 존스에게 합류할 것을 권유했소.&n하지만 감마는 이를 거절했소.

1500700075.english: Why did Captain Gamma refuse...? *Swish*! Ugh, what's wrong? It's suddenly so cold...
1500700075.korean: 감마 대장님은 무슨 이유로 거절한 거예…. 엣췽~!&n으, 뭐지 갑자기 날씨가 넘 추웡…

1500700076.english: Haha, it’s no wonder you’re cold since you’re dressed so lightly. It looks like you’re almost at your destination.
1500700076.korean: 후후, 그리 얇게 입었으니 추운 것도 당연하오.&n아무래도 목적지에 거의 다 도착한 모양이오.

1500700077.english: You'll have to ask Gamma directly why she refused to join and what she plans to do going forward.
1500700077.korean: 감마가 어째서 합류를 거절했고 앞으로 어떻게 할지는 본인에게 직접 물어봐야 할 거요.

1500700078.english: To do that, we must start by finding Gamma in the snowfield over there.
1500700078.korean: 그러기 위해서는 저기 보이는 설원에서 감마를 찾는 것부터 시작해야 하오.

1500700079.english: - Beyond where Dragon pointed, a snowfield shone with a silver light, bathed in the rising dawn light.
1500700079.korean: - 용이 가리킨 저편에는 떠오르는 새벽빛을 받아 은빛으로 빛나는 설원의 모습이 펼쳐져 있었다.

1500700080.english: You must have had a hard time…

1500800001.english: Puet~ Achoo~! Le… Leprechaun… Squad Leader…

1500800003.english: I'm talking about you. I've been working hard through the Steel Line hell winter training until now...
1500800003.korean: 저 말임다. 지금까지 스틸라인 지옥 혹한기 훈련을 열심히 받았지 말임다…

1500800004.english: Was that so? I don't remember clearly, but let's just say that's the case.
1500800004.korean: 그랬나요? 잘 기억나지 않지만, 그렇다고 해두죠.

1500800005.english: But I wonder if all that grueling training up until now was even meaningful...
1500800005.korean: 그런데 지금까지의 그 고된 훈련이 의미가 있었나 싶지 말임다…

1500800006.english: What do you want to talk about?

1500800008.english: I'm going to freeze to death...

1500800009.english: Of course, you'd freeze to death in that state, right?

1500800010.english: The temperature is -20℃ right now, but you're only wearing combat uniforms, aren't you?

1500800011.english: … … Leprechaun Squad Leader? Now that I look at it, that winter uniform looks very warm, doesn't it?
1500800011.korean: … …&n레프리콘 분대장님? 지금 보니 그 방한복 매우 따뜻해 보이지 말임다?

1500800012.english: Yes, it's incredibly warm. I'm telling you, the supplies on the Orca are really good. I should thank Your Excellency.
1500800012.korean: 네, 엄청 따뜻해요.&n오르카의 보급품은 정말 좋다니까요. 각하에게 감사해야겠어요.

1500800013.english: ...Am I going to freeze to death here...?

1500800014.english: Phew... It's just that you forgot to take the supplies. Here, I've packed the supplies for you.
1500800014.korean: 어휴… 자기가 까먹고 보급품을 안 받았을 뿐이잖아요.&n자요, 여기 보급품 제가 챙겨놨어요.

1500800015.english: Leprechaun Squad Leader~! You're the only one who looks out for me~!
1500800015.korean: 레프리콘 분대장님~! 절 챙겨주는 건 역시 분대장님밖에 없슴다~!

1500800016.english: If you feel cold and lonely in the future, please give me a call, and I will do my all to warm you up!!
1500800016.korean: 앞으로 춥고 외로우실 때 불러주시면 제가 전력을 다해서 따듯하게 해드리겠슴다!!

1500800017.english: Wait, wait! What are you saying in such a loud voice!! And I'm not lonely!
1500800017.korean: 잠, 잠깐! 큰 목소리로 뭐라는 거예요!!&n그리고 전 외롭지 않아요!

1500800018.english: What? But recently, every night there have been mysterious sounds coming from the squad leader's bed...
1500800018.korean: 네? 하지만 최근 매일 밤 분대장님 침대 쪽에서 의문의 소리가…

1500800019.english: ...It's strange to have leftover supplies in a place like this. I should give them back to Silky.
1500800019.korean: ...이런 곳에 남는 보급품이 있는 게 이상하네요.&n실키에게 돌려줘야겠어요.

1500800020.english: Leprechaun Squad Leader? Didn't you say that was my supply...?
1500800020.korean: 레프리콘 분대장님?&n그거 제 보급품이라고 하시지 않았슴까…?

1500800021.english: Leprechaun Squad Leader? Where are you going with my supplies?!
1500800021.korean: 레프리콘 분대장님?&n제 보급품을 들고 어디로 가시는 검까~!

1500800022.english: Phew, I finally finished organizing the supplies.

1500800023.english: I was worried about what to do when I was suddenly told that supplies were needed for use in a cold region, but fortunately, I wasn't late in preparing.
1500800023.korean: 갑자기 추운 지역에서 사용할 보급품이 필요하다고 해서 어떻게 하나 싶었는데 다행히 준비가 늦진 않았어요.

1500800024.english: From now on, I should organize the necessary supplies in advance by season and region.
1500800024.korean: 앞으로는 계절이랑 지역별로 구분해서 필요한 보급품을 미리 정리해놔야겠어요.

1500800025.english: Well then, I need to hurry and distribute these supplies to the older sisters first…
1500800025.korean: 그럼, 이 보급품부터 서둘러 언니들에게 나눠드려야 하는데…

1500800028.english: I heard Andvari must have finished organizing the supplies by now, so I came to pick them up! The sisters seem busy with the operation briefing!
1500800028.korean: 슬슬 안드바리가 보급품 정리를 끝냈을 거라고 해서 받으러 왔어!&n언니들은 작전 브리핑 때문에 바쁜 것 같아!

1500800029.english: I originally planned to come with Pixie, but as soon as Ryan arrived at the snowfield, he suddenly ran off, so I chased after him to stop him.
1500800029.korean: 원래 픽시 언니랑 같이 오려고 했는데,&n라이언이 설원에 도착하자마자 갑자기 뛰쳐나가 버려서 말리러 쫓아갔어.

1500800030.english: In that case, you’ve come at just the right time. Here are the supplies for you ladies to use.
1500800030.korean: 그런 거라면 마침 잘 오셨어요. 자, 여기 언니들이 사용할 보급품이에요.

1500800031.english: Whoa? It's heavier than usual supplies!

1500800032.english: After all, it is supplies to be used in cold regions.

1500800033.english: Oh! There are even more chocolate bars inside!
1500800033.korean: 오오! 초코바도 더 많이 들어 있어!

1500800034.english: Since cold weather consumes more energy, I put in more than usual.
1500800034.korean: 아무래도 날이 추우면 체력을 더 소모하니까 평소보다 더 많이 넣어 놨어요.

1500800035.english: Alvis, you might like the winter supplies!

1500800038.english: ...Then, Alvis will take the supplies and deliver them on behalf of the busy sisters.
1500800038.korean: ...그럼, 알비스가 바쁜 언니들을 대신해서 보급품을 가져가 전달해 줄게.

1500800043.english: You can't take them just because there are more chocolate bars than usual? I'll check them all later.
1500800043.korean: 평소보다 초코바가 많다고 해서 가져가시면 안 돼요?&n나중에 전부 확인할 테니까요.

1500800044.english: ...Nymph won't eat the snacks, so at least Nymph's…
1500800044.korean: ...님프 언니는 간식 안 먹을 테니까 님프 언니 꺼라도…

1500800048.english: ...That is all I know about this area. It hasn't been long since I left Poseidon, so nothing has likely changed much.
1500800048.korean: ...이상, 여기까지가 제가 이 지역에서 알고 있는 내용의 전부예요.&n제가 포세이돈을 떠나고 시간이 얼마 지나지 않았으니 크게 달라진 부분은 없을 거예요.

1500800049.english: First of all, I think the top priority is to go to the Poseidon base where the rescue request came in and assess the situation.
1500800049.korean: 우선은 구조 요청이 들어온 포세이돈 주둔지를 찾아가 상황을 파악하는 게 최우선이라 생각해요.

1500800050.english: Upon arriving at the northern front in the Alaska region, we held a brief operational meeting before beginning the rescue operation.
1500800050.korean: 알래스카 지역의 북부 전선에 도착한 우리는 구조 작전을 시작하기 앞서 간단한 작전 회의를 가졌다.

1500800051.english: I understand the details of this operation, Your Excellency. However, I still cannot believe it.
1500800051.korean: 이번 작전의 내용은 이해했습니다, 각하.&n하지만 아직도 믿겨지지 않습니다.

1500800052.english: To think a distress call is coming in from Poseidon, where 'Lemonade Gamma' is... this is not something to be taken lightly.
1500800052.korean: 그 '레모네이드 감마'가 있는 포세이돈에서 구조 요청이 들어오다니… 가볍게 여길 일이 아닙니다.

1500800053.english: … Commander, I am still against this operation.
1500800053.korean: …사령관, 난 여전히 이 작전에 대해서 반대야.

1500800054.english: I'm sorry to say this in front of the person involved, but I doubt even that rescue request is real.
1500800054.korean: 당사자 앞에서 미안하지만, 그 구조 요청 조차도 사실인지 의심스러워.

1500800056.english: Even if that is true, it is a problem. Because it means something has happened that even Lemonade Gamma couldn't handle.
1500800056.korean: 만일 그게 사실이라고 해도 문제야.&n레모네이드 감마조차 감당하기 어려운 일이 벌어졌다는 뜻이니까.

1500800057.english: At the very least, there was no need for the commander to come to such a dangerous place in person…
1500800057.korean: 하다못해 이런 위험한 장소에 사령관이 직접 찾아올 필요는…

1500800059.english: … That’s mean. If you say that, I can’t say anything.
1500800059.korean: …치사해, 그렇게 말하면 내가 아무 말도 할 수 없잖아.

1500800060.english: So that means you know you'll have to make up for it later, right?
1500800060.korean: 그렇다는 건 나중에 벌충해야 한다는 것도 알고 있겠네?

1500800061.english: I definitely remember those words. I won't say anything else.
1500800061.korean: 그 말, 확실히 기억했어.&n이제 더 이상 다른 말은 하지 않을 게.

1500800062.english: And Commander, you don't have to worry about safety. No matter what happens, my brothers and I will make sure to protect you.
1500800062.korean: 그리고 사령관, 안전에 대해서는 걱정하지 않아도 돼.&n무슨 일이 있어도 나와 동생들이 반드시 지킬 테니까.

1500800063.english: Well then, I'll go explain the details of the operation to my younger siblings.
1500800063.korean: 그럼, 나는 동생들에게 작전 내용을 설명하러 가볼게.

1500800064.english: ...It seems Leona is still the same.

1500800066.english: As you know, Your Excellency, the Alaska region holds special significance for Iron-Blooded Leona... no, for the Sisters of Valhalla. They are bound to be sensitive about it.
1500800066.korean: 각하도 아시다시피 철혈의 레오나…&n아니, 시스터즈 오브 발할라에게 있어서 알래스카 지역은 특별한 의미를 갖고 있으니까요.&n민감할 수밖에 없을 겁니다.

1500800067.english: - The War of Alliance and the War of Annihilation… I heard that many sisters were lost in the Alaska region during both wars.
1500800067.korean: - 연합 전쟁과 멸망 전쟁… 두 전쟁에서 많은 자매들을 알래스카 지역에서 잃었다고 들었다.

1500800069.english: Haha, of course. Unlike back then, Your Excellency is with us now.
1500800069.korean: 후후, 물론입니다.&n그때와 다르게 지금의 저희에게는 각하께서 함께하니까요.

1500800070.english: Master, this is a big problem!

1500800071.english: I was looking around when I spotted a swarm of Iron Bugs not far away.
1500800071.korean: 주변을 둘러보고 있었는데 그리 멀지 않는 곳에서 철충의 무리를 발견했어.

1500800072.english: If it were just an ordinary swarm of Iron Bugs, I could just go in and smash them all, but the strange thing is...
1500800072.korean: 그냥 평범한 철충 무리면 내가 가서 콱 다 찍어버리면 그만이지만, 그게 좀 이상한 게…

1500800073.english: It looked like someone was being chased by that swarm of Iron Bugs.
1500800073.korean: 누군가가 그 철충 무리에게 쫓기는 것 같았어.

1500800074.english: If you're being chased... surely not... Master!

1500800076.english: Steel Line Unit!! Sortie right now!
1500800076.korean: 스틸 라인 부대!! 지금 바로 출격한다!

1500800078.english: Thank you for worrying about me.

1500800079.english: Just as everyone believes in me, I believe in everyone too.
1500800079.korean: 모두가 나를 믿고 있는 만큼 나도 모두를 믿고 있으니까.

1500800080.english: But I feel like I need to check this out myself.
1500800080.korean: 하지만 이번 일은 직접 확인해야 할 것 같은 기분이 들어.

1500800081.english: You know that I will forgive you.
1500800081.korean: 용서해 줄 거란 것도 알고 있지.

1500800083.english: This time, we will definitely all return safely together.
1500800083.korean: 이번에는 반드시 모두 함께 무사히 돌아갈 거야.

1500900001.english: Master, the bioroid being chased over there…!

1500900003.english: Your Excellency, I have visually confirmed a bioroid being chased by an Iron Bug.
1500900003.korean: 각하, 철충에게 쫓기는 바이오로이드를 육안으로 확인했습니다.

1500900006.english: Steel Line Unit! Entering battle now!
1500900006.korean: 스틸 라인 부대! 지금부터 전투에 돌입한다!

1500900007.english: Show those bastards exactly what your forces are capable of!

1500900008.english: Wait, Rhode! I'll save you right now!

1500900009.english: [Act with the protection of the target as your top priority.]

1501000002.english: Lord Merope? Is it really Lord Merope?

1501000005.english: I'm so glad you're safe... You held on well until I got back.
1501000005.korean: 무사해서 정말 다행이야…&n내가 올 때까지 잘 버티고 있었어.

1501000006.english: Yes! I believed that if it was Merope, you would definitely come to save me!
1501000006.korean: 네! 메로페 님이라면 반드시 저를 구해주러 오실 거라 믿고 있었어요!

1501000007.english: Waaah... I promised Merope I wouldn't cry, but tears are coming out...
1501000007.korean: 후에엥… 울지 않겠다고 메로페 님과 약속했는데 눈물이 나와요…

1501000008.english: Still, I promised myself I wouldn't cry until we meet again. It's okay to cry now, right?
1501000008.korean: 그래도 다시 만나기 전까지 울지 않기로 했으니까.&n지금은 울어도 괜찮겠죠?

1501000009.english: Of course. Because we met again like this.

1501000011.english: All unit members, do not let your guard down and keep watch on your surroundings!
1501000011.korean: 전 부대원은 긴장을 늦추지 말고 주변을 경계해라!

1501000012.english: Your Excellency, all surrounding Iron Bugs have been destroyed and the target has been protected.
1501000012.korean: 각하, 주변의 철충을 전부 격파, 목표 대상을 보호했습니다.

1501000013.english: Since the number of Iron Bug was not very large, there were no casualties on our side.
1501000013.korean: 철충의 수가 그리 많지 않았기에 아군의 피해는 전무합니다.

1501000015.english: Situation over! Steel Line Unit! Return to base now!
1501000015.korean: 상황 종료!&n스틸 라인 부대! 지금부터 기지로 귀환한다!

1501000016.english: - Shortly after, Merope and the Steel Line unit returned to the temporary base with the protected bioroids.
1501000016.korean: - 잠시 후, 메로페와 스틸 라인 부대가 보호한 바이오로이드를 데리고 임시 기지로 돌아왔다.

1501000017.english: Rhode, it's safe now. So please move away. I can't breathe.
1501000017.korean: 로데, 이제 안전해요. 그러니까 좀 떨어져 주세요.&n숨 막혀요.

1501000018.english: Haa~ There are so many people I'm seeing for the first time... Besides, it's been such a long time since I've seen this many Bioroids.
1501000018.korean: 하으~ 처음 보는 분들이 잔뜩 있으셔서…&n게다가 이렇게 많은 바이오로이드 분들을 보는 건 너무 오랜만인걸요.

1501000019.english: They are all good people, so there is no need to be scared.
1501000019.korean: 다 좋은 분들이니까 그렇게 겁먹을 필요는 없어요.

1501000021.english: - As I approached, Merope reflexively and naturally thrust her head forward, just as she always did, and I naturally stroked Merope's head, just as I always did.
1501000021.korean: - 메로페는 내가 다가가자 늘 그랬던 것처럼 반사적으로 자연스럽게 머리를 내밀었고, 나도 늘 그랬던 것처럼 자연스럽게 메로페의 머리를 쓰다듬었다.

1501000022.english: Hehehe~ I love getting petted so much, Master!

1501000023.english: Thank you so much, Master! If it weren't for you, Rhode would have been in danger!
1501000023.korean: 주인님, 정말 고마워! 주인님이 아니었으면 로데가 위험했을 거야!

1501000024.english: Really? Did I do a good job? Hehe, then please praise me a little more. You can pet my tail to your heart's content today!
1501000024.korean: 정말? 나 잘한 거야?&n헤헤, 그럼 좀 더 칭찬해 줘. 오늘은 내 꼬리 마음껏 만져도 괜찮아!

1501000029.english: Rhode, let me introduce you. This is the last human, the commander of Orca.
1501000029.korean: 로데, 소개할게. 이분이 마지막 인간님이신 오르카의 사령관님이야.

1501000030.english: No, even if you try to gloss over it as if nothing happened... what was that just now? Who was that? You weren't the Merope I know.
1501000030.korean: 아니, 아무 일도 없었던 것처럼 얼버무리셔도… 방금 뭐였어요?&n누구였어요? 제가 알고 있는 메로페 님이 아니셨는데요?

1501000031.english: That wasn't the Merope you always seem, with your serious and dignified demeanor, handling everything in an instant.
1501000031.korean: 언제나 진지하고 위엄있는 모습으로 어떤 일이든 순식간에 처리하시는 메로페 님의 모습이 아니셨는데요?

1501000032.english: Meow, this is the first time I've seen Merope acting cute towards someone.
1501000032.korean: 저, 메로페 님이 누군가에게 애교 부리시는 모습 처음 봤어요.

1501000034.english: But... "Master!" or... "Hehehe~ I love it!" or... "You can pet my tail as much as you want!" or...
1501000034.korean: 그치만... "주인님!" 이라던가... "에헤헤~ 엄청 좋아!" 라던가…&n"내 꼬리 마음껏 만져도 괜찮아!" 라던가…

1501000035.english: You were super cute! Even though you never once let me touch your tail...
1501000035.korean: 엄청 귀여우셨는데요?&n저한테는 단 한 번도 꼬리 만지지 못하게 하셨으면서…

1501000036.english: That's unfair! I want to pet Merope's tail too!
1501000036.korean: 치사해요~! 저도 메로페 님 꼬리 만지고 싶어요!

1501000037.english: Rhode? Looks like you want to get a proper scolding for the first time in a while, huh?
1501000037.korean: 로데? 오랜만에 제대로 혼나 보고 싶나 보죠?

1501000038.english: Hmm, maybe it's because I saw Merope's cute true self, but maybe it's not that scary...?
1501000038.korean: 음, 메로페 님의 귀여운 본모습을 봐서 그런지 별로 무섭지 않을지도…?

1501000039.english: Hehe~ Then shall we test how long you can last?
1501000039.korean: 헤에~ 그럼 어디 언제까지 버틸 수 있나 시험해 볼까?

1501000040.english: Ah... I'm sorry. I'm sorry. I got too carried away. As expected, I don't like getting hurt.
1501000040.korean: 아… 죄송해요. 죄송해요. 너무 기어올랐어요.&n역시 아픈 건 싫어요.

1501000043.english: - And so, Meropé's terrible? scary? cute? punishment continued for a while.
1501000043.korean: - 그렇게 메로페의 끔찍하고? 무섭고? 귀여운? 처벌은 한동안 계속됐다.

1501000045.english: Good job. Keep protecting the temporary base just like that.

1501000048.english: It was a structure that was possible because Merope was there. You did really well.
1501000048.korean: 메로페가 있었기 때문에 가능했던 구조야. 아주 잘했어.

1501100001.english: Haa... Ahayo... Rhode's cheek... Adora will go as originally planned...
1501100001.korean: 하으… 아하요… 로데의 볼... 언래대로 아도라 가 꺼에요…

1501100002.english: Hmph, I'm actually being really lenient!
1501100002.korean: 흥, 이 정도면 많이 봐 준거야!

1501100003.english: I'm sorry, Master. For showing you such an embarrassing sight.

1501100004.english: That is, a little... right now

1501100005.english: More importantly! Right now, the priority is to hear what happened to Rhode!
1501100005.korean: 그보다! 지금은 로데에게 무슨 일이 있었는지 듣는 게 우선이에요!

1501100006.english: Please tell me, Rhode. What on earth happened?
1501100006.korean: 알려주세요, 로데.&n대체 무슨 일이 있었던 거예요?

1501100008.english: Poseidon has countless AGSs and warships, you know. To think they are being chased by Iron Bug…
1501100008.korean: 포세이돈에는 수많은 AGS와 함선이 있잖아요.&n그런데 철충에게 쫓기고 있다니…

1501100009.english: I can't get in touch with Annihilator either. What happened?
1501100009.korean: 어나이얼레이터와도 연락이 안 되는데 무슨 일이 있었던 거예요?

1501100010.english: Above all, where is Gamma right now?
1501100010.korean: 무엇보다 감마 님은 지금 어디에 계시죠?

1501100011.english: As for Gamma... I'm not really sure either.

1501100012.english: At first, it was an attack by Iron Bugs that wasn't that big of a deal.
1501100012.korean: 처음에는 그렇게 대단하지 않은 철충의 습격이었어요.

1501100013.english: There were quite a lot of them, but Gamma handled most of them by herself, and the AGS members and I finished off the remaining Iron Bug.
1501100013.korean: 수는 좀 많았지만, 감마 님이 혼자서 대부분 처리해주셨고 남은 철충은 저와 AGS 분들이 마무리했어요.

1501100014.english: That... until the 'Connector Iron Bugs' appeared.

1501100015.english: [Lord Rhode, according to reports from each AGS, all the attacking Iron Bug have been defeated.]
1501100015.korean: [로데 님, 각 AGS들의 보고에 따르면 습격한 철충들은 전부 쓰러졌다고 합니다.]

1501100016.english: Phew, at first I was worried about how it would turn out... I'm so relieved that everything was sorted out safely.
1501100016.korean: 휴, 처음에는 어떻게 되나 싶었는데... 무사히 정리돼서 다행이에요.

1501100017.english: Although Gamma took them down by herself for the most part.

1501100019.english: [No. I just did what I had to do.]

1501100021.english: Oh, welcome, Gamma! You've worked hard!

1501100022.english: I thought it would be fun since it's been a while since our last battle, but it ended anticlimactically. All my excitement is gone.
1501100022.korean: 간만의 전투라 날 즐겁게 해줄 거라 생각했는데, 싱겁게 끝났군.&n달아오른 흥이 다 깨져버렸어.

1501100023.english: You Iron Bugs, if you were going to launch an attack, you should have swarmed in ten times more than you did now.
1501100023.korean: 철충 녀석들, 습격을 할 거면 지금보다 열 배는 더 몰려왔었어야지.

1501100024.english: Gamma! Please don't say things like that. If you keep doing that, they will really come looking for you!
1501100024.korean: 감마 님~! 그런 소리 하지 말아 주세요.&n그러다가 정말로 찾아온다고요!

1501100025.english: Don't be so weak-hearted. That little brat never made a fuss over something like this.
1501100025.korean: 이 정도로 약한 소리 하지 마라.&n꼬맹이 녀석은 이런 걸로 토 달지 않았다고.

1501100026.english: Considering how Gamma would sigh heavily every time that happened, maybe she had just given up...
1501100026.korean: 감마 님이 그러실 때마다 한숨을 푹푹 내쉬던걸 생각하면&n그건 그냥 포기하셨던 게 아닐까요…

1501100027.english: [Gamma, multiple Iron Bug have been detected again.]

1501100028.english: Look at that! Just as I expected! He appeared!

1501100029.english: Hahaha! Good, that’s how it should be! How many people are there this time?
1501100029.korean: 하하하! 좋아, 그렇게 나와야지!&n이번에는 머릿수가 어떻게 되지?

1501100030.english: [It is not much different from a moment ago, but this time it seems that 'connectors' are mixed in.]
1501100030.korean: [조금 전과 크게 다르지 않습니다만, 이번에는 '연결체'가 섞여있는 것 같습니다.]

1501100031.english: Oh? It's been a while since I've seen a 'Connector'. I'll really be able to enjoy this one to the fullest.
1501100031.korean: 호오? '연결체'를 보는 건 또 오랜만이군.&n이번에야말로 제대로 즐길 수 있겠어.

1501100032.english: Send out the AGS. Let's take a look at what kind of thing it is first.
1501100032.korean: AGS를 내보내. 어떤 녀석인지 구경부터 해보자고.

1501100033.english: [Yes, the AGS on alert. Contact made with an approaching connector.]
1501100033.korean: [네, 경계 중이던 AGS. 접근 중인 연결체와 접촉.]

1501100034.english: [...Anomaly occurred. Communication with the AGS in contact with the connection has been lost.]
1501100034.korean: [...이상 사태 발생. 연결체와 접촉한 AGS와의 통신이 끊어졌습니다.]

1501100035.english: Hmm? Did I get attacked by the Nexus?

1501100036.english: [No. The connection was forcibly disconnected before the attack even occurred.]
1501100036.korean: [아닙니다. 공격을 받기도 전에 강제로 연결이 끊어졌습니다.]

1501100041.english: Mr. Annihilator!? What's wrong? Say something!
1501100041.korean: 어나이얼레이터 씨!? 왜 그러세요? 뭐라고 말 좀 해보세요!

1501100044.english: Try to get out of here and contact Epsilon or Omega.
1501100044.korean: 너는 이곳을 빠져나가 엡실론이나 오메가에게 연락을 시도해 봐라.

1501100045.english: What? What are you planning to do, Gamma?

1501100046.english: What do you mean? You went to such lengths for me, so I have to repay you properly.
1501100046.korean: 어떻게 하긴?&n날 위해 이렇게까지 준비를 해줬는데 보답은 제대로 해야지.

1501100048.english: Don't make such nonsensical remarks about going together. This is an order.
1501100048.korean: 같이 가겠다는 그런 시답지 않는 말을 하지 마라.&n이건 명령이다.

1501100049.english: Do what you can do now.
1501100049.korean: 지금은 네가 할 수 있는 일을 해라.

1501100051.english: I will definitely tell Lady Merope about this later!
1501100051.korean: 이 일은 나중에 꼭 메로페 님한테 이를 테니까요!

1501100053.english: Threatening to tell the little kid is going too far. I'm tired of hearing nagging.
1501100053.korean: 꼬맹이 녀석에게 이르겠다니, 너무 한 걸.&n이제 잔소리는 그만 듣고 싶은데 말이야.

1501100054.english: So I left the base to contact the outside world. However, for some reason, all lines connecting to the outside were blocked.
1501100054.korean: 그렇게 저는 외부와 연락하기 위해 기지를 떠났어요.&n하지만 어째서인지 외부와 연결된 모든 회선이 막혀 있었어요.

1501100055.english: Except for the one line that Merope told me about.
1501100055.korean: 유일하게 메로페 님이 저한테 알려주신 회선 하나만 제외하고 말이에요.

1501100056.english: After that, it is as you know, Merope.
1501100056.korean: 그 뒤로는 메로페 님이 알고 계시는 대로에요.

1501100057.korean: - 로데는 더 이상 말을 잇지 못했다.

1501100058.english: can't believe it. To think they severed the Annihilator's control. It's hard to believe this was orchestrated by the Iron Bug.
1501100058.korean: 믿어지지 않아요. 어나이얼레이터의 통제를 끊어버리다니.&n이건 철충이 꾸민 짓이라고 보기 어려워요.

1501100059.english: Poseidon's security isn't quite on par with other PECS companies, but that doesn't mean it's easy to deal with. Unless you fully grasp its internal structure, you cannot take control.
1501100059.korean: 포세이돈의 시큐리티는 다른 PECS 소속의 회사 만큼은 아니지만, 그렇다고 결코 만만하지 않아요.&n내부 구조를 전부 파악하고 있지 않는 이상 통제권을 빼앗을 수는 없어요.

1501100060.english: If this is really a scheme orchestrated by the Iron Bug... it is not something to be taken lightly.
1501100060.korean: 만약 정말로 철충이 꾸민 짓이라면… 쉽게 넘어갈 일이 아니에요.

1501100061.english: We need to hurry and find Gamma, if only to find out more details.
1501100061.korean: 좀 더 자세히 알아보기 위해서라도 서둘러 감마 님을 찾을 필요가 있어요.

1501100062.english: - The Iron Bug raid, Poseidon's fleet out of control.
1501100062.korean: - 철충의 습격, 통제를 잃은 포세이돈의 함대.

1501100063.english: - Perhaps all of this is not a coincidence, but a planned event.
1501100063.korean: - 어쩌면 이 모든 것이 우연이 아닌, 계획된 일일지도 모른다.

1501100064.english: No, it was cute so it was fun.

1501100065.english: So you’re not showing your usual cute side anymore?
1501100065.korean: 그보다 이제 평소 귀여운 모습은 안보여 주는 거야?

1501100067.english: Got it, let's hurry and go to the Poseidon base.

1501200001.english: Captain, here is a report from the Leprechaun squad that entered first.
1501200001.korean: 대장님, 선 진입한 레프리콘 분대로부터의 보고입니다.

1501200002.english: Successfully entered Poseidon Base. No reaction from Iron Bug. It is said that Poseidon Base appears to be currently empty.
1501200002.korean: 포세이돈 기지 안으로 진입 성공. 철충의 반응 없음.&n현재 포세이돈 기지는 텅 비어 있는 것 같다고 합니다.

1501200004.english: Starting now, establish defensive positions centered around the base! Platoons 1 and 2 take the front, and Platoons 3 and 4 take the rear! The rest of you thoroughly search the inside of the base!
1501200004.korean: 지금부터 기지를 중심으로 방어 진지를 구축한다!&n1, 2소대는 전방을, 3, 4소대는 후방을 맡아라! 나머지는 기지 안을 샅샅이 조사한다!

1501200005.english: We never know when the Iron Bugs might attack again! Everyone, stay alert!
1501200005.korean: 언제 철충들이 다시 습격할지 모른다! 다들 정신 똑바로 차리도록!

1501200007.english: I can't believe there are so many Iron Bug corpses. How is it over there, Bheur?
1501200007.korean: 철충의 시체가 이렇게나 많다니.&n그쪽은 어떻죠, 베라?

1501200008.english: It's the same here. Every single one of them is shattered into pieces.
1501200008.korean: 여기도 마찬가지예요.&n하나같이 전부 산산조각 나 있어요.

1501200009.english: I can't believe she took all of this down by herself.
1501200009.korean: 이걸 전부 혼자서 쓰러트렸다는 게 믿어지지가 않아요.

1501200010.english: You're right. Lemonade Gamma is the only one who mercilessly obliterates Iron Bugs like this.
1501200010.korean: 맞을 거예요.&n이런 식으로 철충을 사정없이 박살 내는 건 레모네이드 감마밖에 없으니까요.

1501200011.english: I... I'm getting a little scared...

1501200012.english: If we think these Iron Bugs attacked us…
1501200012.korean: 만약 이 철충들이 저희들을 습격했다고 생각하면…

1501200013.english: Bheur, it's okay. You don't need to worry.

1501200016.english: As long as I am here, the Sisters of Valhalla will never be defeated.
1501200016.korean: 내가 있는 한, 시스터즈 오브 발할라는 절대 지지 않아.

1501200017.english: Hehe, that's exactly right. After all, we have Captain Leona.
1501200017.korean: 후훗, 그 말대로에요.&n저희에게는 레오나 대장님이 계시니까요.

1501200018.english: And I have everyone. ...Right, once this operation is over, let's all go eat something delicious together.
1501200018.korean: 그리고 나에겐 모두가 있으니까.&n...그렇지, 이 작전이 끝나면 다 같이 맛있는 걸 먹으러 가자.

1501200019.english: That's a good idea. Your younger siblings will be happy too.

1501200020.english: Captain Leona, is there anything you would like to eat?
1501200020.korean: 레오나 대장님은 드시고 싶은 게 있나요?

1501200021.english: Hmm, nothing really comes to mind. What about you, Sandgirl?
1501200021.korean: 음, 딱히 떠오르는 건 없는데.&n너는 어때? 샌드걸.

1501200023.english: It just suddenly occurred to me... how about a hamburger? For some reason, I feel like eating a hamburger.
1501200023.korean: 갑자기 떠올랐는데 햄버거… 는 어떠세요?&n왠지 햄버거가 먹고 싶은 기분이에요.

1501200024.english: Hamburgers? Come to think of it, it's been a long time since I've had one. Alright, then I'm going to guard this place to eat hamburgers with everyone.
1501200024.korean: 햄버거? 그러고 보니 안 먹어본지 오래됐네.&n좋아, 그럼 모두와 함께 햄버거를 먹기 위해 이곳을 지키는 거야.

1501200026.english: If it is to eat hamburgers with both sisters, I will do my best.
1501200026.korean: 자매 모두와 햄버거를 먹기 위해서라면, 저 최선을 다하겠습니다.

1501200027.english: - Having safely entered the Poseidon base, we gathered information in preparation for a potential future raid.
1501200027.korean: - 무사히 포세이돈 기지로 진입한 우리는 다시 있을지 모를 습격에 대비해 정보를 수집했다.

1501200028.english: You're wrong. We've completely lost control of the Annihilator. To fix this, we'll need the hacking-specialized Kestos Himas that Alpha or Beta possesses.
1501200028.korean: 틀렸어요. 완전히 어나이얼레이터의 제어권을 잃었어요.&n이걸 해결하려면 알파 님이나 베타 님이 가진 해킹에 특화된 케스토스 히마스가 필요할 거예요.

1501200029.english: The only saving grace is that before completely losing control, we completely removed the ship control systems to prevent the enemy from exploiting the fleet.
1501200029.korean: 그나마 다행이라면 제어권을 완전히 잃기 전에, 적에게 함대를 이용당하지 않도록 함선 제어 시스템을 완전히 제거했어요.

1501200030.english: The Kestos Himas possessed by Gamma is a weapon specialized for combat. It has basic computational capabilities, but it is impossible to regain lost control.
1501200030.korean: 감마 님이 가진 케스토스 히마스는 전투에 특화된 무장이에요.&n기본적인 연산 능력은 있지만, 잃어버린 제어권을 다시 빼앗는 일은 불가능해요.

1501200031.english: - "Taking back the lost control," Merope said.
1501200031.korean: - 잃어버린 제어권을 다시 빼앗는다, 메로페는 그렇게 얘기했다.

1501200032.english: - And it was said that to solve this, the kestos himas possessed by lemonade is needed. This implies only one thing.
1501200032.korean: - 그리고 이를 해결하기 위해서는 레모네이드가 가진 케스토스 히마스가 필요하다고 했다.&n이것이 의미하는 바는 한 가지.

1501200033.english: Yes, that is correct. At the very least, it is certain that they thoroughly manipulated the situation so that Poseidon would be left defenseless against the Iron Bug's attack.
1501200033.korean: 네, 맞아요.&n적어도 포세이돈이 철충의 습격에 무방비하게 당하도록 철저히 조작한 것만큼은 확실해요.

1501200034.english: - You manipulated it so that Gamma, who is also Lemonade, would get hurt? Why on earth...
1501200034.korean: - 같은 레모네이드인 감마가 당하도록 조작했다고? 대체 어째서…

1501200036.english: Well, there is something Arthur needs to come and see in person.
1501200036.korean: 그게, 아서가 직접 와서 봐야 할 게 있어.

1501200038.english: I found this while looking around the base.
1501200038.korean: 그게 기지 안을 둘러보다가 이런 걸 발견했어.

1501200039.english: - At the spot Alcyone pointed to, there were the remains of an AGS that had been shattered into pieces during the process of being infected by the Iron Bug.
1501200039.korean: - 알키오네가 가리킨 곳에는 철충에 감염되는 과정 중에 산산히 부서진 AGS의 잔해가 있었다.

1501200040.english: That can't be... PECS's AGS is protected by the erosion immunity circuit that Zeta made for us.
1501200040.korean: 그럴 리가… PECS의 AGS는 제타 님이 만들어주신 침식 면역 회로로 보호받고 있는걸요.

1501200041.english: This isn't all the infected AGS. According to the other members, it seems there are more scattered throughout the base.
1501200041.korean: 감염된 AGS는 이게 전부가 아니야.&n다른 대원들의 말로는 기지 곳곳에 있다는 것 같아.

1501200043.english: Then, that means the Iron Bug has evolved enough to break through the erosion immunity circuit, right?
1501200043.korean: 그렇다면, 철충이 침식 면역 회로를 뚫을 정도로 진화를 했다는 거잖아?

1501200044.english: Or it could simply be that the erosion immunity circuit is broken.
1501200044.korean: 아니면 단순히 침식 면역 회로가 고장났을 수도 있고.

1501200045.english: - The usurpation of control by one of the Lemonades. And the neutralization of the circuit created by Lemonade Zeta that prevents the Iron Bug's erosion...
1501200045.korean: - 레모네이드들 중 누군가에 의한 제어권 강탈. 그리고 레모네이드 제타가 만든 철충의 침식을 막는 회로의 무력화…

1501200046.english: - What on earth is their ulterior motive?

1501200047.english: Alright! I'll be right back! Meropé, please give me directions!
1501200047.korean: 알았어! 빨리 다녀올게!&n메로페, 길 안내 부탁해!

1501200048.english: Yeah! Leave it to me! Sister Alcyone!

1501200049.english: Um... may I come along too? The thing is... I'm worried about Gamma...
1501200049.korean: 저기… 저도 같이 가도 될까요?&n그게 그러니까… 감마 님이 걱정되기도 하고…

1501200050.english: - Rhode spoke softly, as if anxious about being separated from Merope, and Merope looked at me as if gauging my intentions.
1501200050.korean: - 로데는 메로페와 떨어지는 게 불안한지 작게 말했고 메로페는 내 의사를 살피듯 날 바라보았다.

1501200053.english: … Yes! Please, leave it to me! I mean… Commander Orca…!

1501200054.english: - Alcyone lifted the infected AGS high and quickly left the base with the two of them.
1501200054.korean: - 알키오네는 감염된 AGS를 번쩍 들더니 두 사람과 함께 빠르게 기지를 나섰다.

1501200055.english: - A series of unpredictable events, an ominous premonition, and gradually escalating tension.
1501200055.korean: - 짐작할 수 없는 일의 연속, 불길한 예감. 그리고 서서히 고조되는 긴장감.

1501200056.english: - As always. Everything is bound to happen suddenly right in front of you.
1501200056.korean: - 언제나 그렇듯.&n모든 일은 어느덧 갑자기 코앞으로 닥치기 마련이다.

1501200057.english: My Lord, something terrible has happened!

1501200058.english: - Dragon's urgent voice was heard through the communicator.
1501200058.korean: - 통신기를 통해 용의 다급한 목소리가 들려왔다.

1501200059.english: Countless swarms of Iron Bugs are coming toward this base from the north!
1501200059.korean: 수많은 철충 무리가 북쪽으로부터 이쪽 기지를 향해 오고 있소!

1501200060.english: - Finally, the Iron Bug's attack began.

1501200061.english: Can't it be Gamma's Cestos Himas?
1501200061.korean: 감마의 케스토스 히마스로는 안 되는 거야?

1501200062.english: So you're saying the main culprit of this attack is one of the lemonades?
1501200062.korean: 이번 습격의 주범은 레모네이드 중 하나라는 건가.

1501200065.english: Is AGS getting infected by iron bugs…?

1501200066.english: Alcyone, take this AGS with Merope on the ship and contact the doctor.
1501200066.korean: 알키오네, 메로페와 함께 이 AGS를 함선으로 가져가 닥터에게 연락해 줘

1501200067.english: If it's a doctor, they'll look into it in detail.

1501200069.english: Please take good care of the two of them.

1501300001.english: Commander, a massive number of Iron Bugs are approaching the base!
1501300001.korean: 대장님, 엄청난 수의 철충이 기지로 다가오고 있습니다!

1501300002.english: Steel Line, all personnel, to your positions! Everyone, load your weapons and prepare for the attack!
1501300002.korean: 스틸 라인 전원, 각자 위치로!&n모두 무기를 장전하고 공격에 대비하라!

1501300003.english: Move fast! We will fight to the very end!
1501300003.korean: 어서 빠르게 움직여라! 우리는 마지막까지 싸운다!

1501300005.english: It seems the number of Iron Bugs is considerable this time.
1501300005.korean: 이번에는 철충의 수가 상당한 것 같습니다.

1501300007.english: How could that be? On the contrary, I am glad.

1501300008.english: Isn't the time finally here to show the results of the countless hellish training sessions we've gone through together with the team members?
1501300008.korean: 지금까지 대원들과 함께했던 수많은 지옥훈련의 성과를 보여줄 때가 드디어 찾아온 게 아닙니까.

1501300010.english: Just give me the order, and I will annihilate the enemies alongside the Steel Line members.
1501300010.korean: 명령만 내려주시면, 스틸 라인 대원들과 함께 적들을 섬멸하겠습니다.

1501300011.english: Very well, I grant permission. Show me your true power!

1501300012.english: What are you thinking that makes you look so serious? Focus, the Iron Bugs are going to swarm this place soon.
1501300012.korean: 무슨 생각 중이길래 그렇게 심각한 표정을 하고 있어?&n집중해, 철충들이 곧 이곳으로 몰려올 거야.

1501300014.english: You know I won't let that slide, right? If it could interfere with the operation, you'd better confess right now.
1501300014.korean: 내가 그런 말로 넘어가지 않을 거라는 건 알고 있겠지?&n작전에 방해될 수 있는 일이라면 지금 빨리 실토하는 게 좋아.

1501300015.english: … I was just thinking about Valkyrie No. 117.

1501300016.english: It doesn't mean anything else. After all, she has plenty of useful combat experience here in Alaska in her memory.
1501300016.korean: 다른 의미가 있는 건 아닙니다.&n그녀의 기억 안에는 이곳 알래스카에서의 유용한 전투 경험이 많으니까요.

1501300019.english: Valkyrie, you... 'me'... 'her' who led everyone to their deaths...

1501300020.english: I think it is fortunate to have someone like Captain Leona as my captain.
1501300020.korean: 저는 레오나 대장님 같은 분을 대장으로 모실 수 있어 다행이라고 생각합니다.

1501300021.english: It’s not just me. All of us Valhalla sisters are happy to have met the Captain and to be able to fight together again.
1501300021.korean: 저 뿐만이 아닙니다.&n저희 발할라 자매 모두가 대장님을 만나서, 다시 함께 싸울 수 있어 기쁘게 여기고 있어요.

1501300022.english: Just like the sisters in our memories were.
1501300022.korean: 우리의 기억 속의 자매들이 그랬던 것처럼 말이죠.

1501300023.english: ...It's like you act like you know everything, isn't it?

1501300024.english: After all, I've been with the Captain for a long time.
1501300024.korean: 그야 오랫동안 대장님과 함께 한 사이인걸요.

1501300025.english: The fact that all the sisters have returned from Valhalla and are fighting together again is...
1501300025.korean: 이렇게 자매들 모두가 발할라에서 돌아와 다시 함께 싸우게 되었다는 건.

1501300026.english: Because it means there was a place for everyone in Valhalla.

1501300027.english: Including the Captain's position, you know.

1501300028.english: So please take command. We sisters will follow you forever, Captain.
1501300028.korean: 그러니까 지휘를 해주세요.&n저희 자매들은 언제까지나 대장님을 따를 겁니다.

1501300029.english: ...Thank you, Valkyrie. Thanks to you, I feel relieved.

1501300030.english: Hehe, at this rate, I don't know who the older sister is.

1501300031.english: Just because you're the older sister doesn't mean you can't act spoiled toward your younger sibling. If it's just occasionally, I'll gladly let it slide.
1501300031.korean: 언니라고 해서 동생에게 어리광 부리지 말라는 법은 없으니까요.&n가끔이라면 기꺼이 받아드리겠습니다.

1501300032.english: Well, I don't know if something like this will happen again, but I'll be counting on you next time.
1501300032.korean: 글쎄, 이런 일이 또 있을지는 모르겠지만, 그때는 잘 부탁할게.

1501300034.english: Everyone! Focus on the Commander Frame's commands!

1501300035.english: Just as you have done until now! And from now on! Obey my command!
1501300035.korean: 지금까지 그래왔던 것처럼!&n그리고 앞으로도! 내 지휘에 따르도록!

1501400001.english: Leprechaun Squad Leader, I should be thankful that I am part of Orca again.
1501400001.korean: 레프리콘 분대장님, 저 또다시 오르카에 소속된 걸 다행으로 생각하지 말임다.

1501400002.english: That's a coincidence. I think the same thing.

1501400003.english: What is the reason this time?

1501400005.english: I'm telling you, how on earth did we win?
1501400005.korean: 저희 대체 어떻게 이긴 건지 말임다.

1501400006.english: You know, before the battle started, I was intimidated by the sheer number of Iron Bugs swarming in.
1501400006.korean: 저, 전투가 시작되기 전에는 몰려오는 철충의 수를 보고 기가 질렸지 말임다.

1501400007.english: But after frantically moving according to the orders of the Captain and the Regimental Commander, I came to my senses and found we were winning.
1501400007.korean: 그런데 대장님과 연대장님의 명령대로 정신없이 움직이다 정신 차리고 보니 이기고 있지 말임다.

1501400008.english: It might be the result of the hellish training we've been doing.
1501400008.korean: 그동안 지옥 같던 훈련의 성과가 발휘된 걸지도 모르겠슴다.

1501400009.english: That is true, but I suppose it is largely due to the Commander's leadership.
1501400009.korean: 그것도 그렇지만, 역시 사령관님의 지휘 덕이 크겠죠.

1501400010.english: Even if the world ends tomorrow, I will follow the Commander.
1501400010.korean: 내일 세상이 멸망한다고 해도 저는 사령관님을 따라갈 검다.

1501400014.english: Brownie, didn't you see something over there just now? It looked like an Iron Bug...
1501400014.korean: 브라우니, 지금 저쪽에서 뭔가 보이지 않았어요?&n철충처럼 보이긴 했는데…

1501400015.english: You mean the Iron Bug? I didn't see anything... Ah... uh...?
1501400015.korean: 철충 말임까? 저는 아무것도 보지 못했… 아… 어…?

1501400017.english: Brownie? What's wrong? You're just standing there blankly.
1501400017.korean: 브라우니? 갑자기 왜 그래요? 멍하니 서 있고.

1501400019.english: Brownie…? Wait, Brownie! Stop messing around and say something!
1501400019.korean: 브라우니…? 잠깐, 브라우니! 장난치지 말고 말 좀 해 봐요!

1501400022.english: Nymph! Respond! Where on earth are you?
1501400022.korean: 님프! 응답하세요! 대체 어디에 있는 거죠?

1501400024.english: Damn it, my vision is... because of the snow

1501400025.english: If more Iron Bugs appear at this rate, it's going to be a big problem...
1501400025.korean: 이러다가 철충의 더 나타나기라도 했다간 큰일인데…

1501400027.english: That's a relief. I thought I'd missed it!

1501400028.english: What on earth were you doing here all alone?
1501400028.korean: 혼자 여기서 대체 뭘 하고 있었던 거예요?

1501400033.english: Nymph!? What's wrong! Snap out of it!

1501400036.english: Captain, we have a communication from Sergeant Efreeti. She reports that communication with the Leprechaun Squad has been lost.
1501400036.korean: 대장님, 이프리트 하사에게 통신이 들어왔습니다.&n레프리콘 분대와 통신이 두절되었다고 합니다.

1501400037.english: What? Communication cut off? Did more Iron Bugs appear?
1501400037.korean: 뭐? 통신 두절? 설마 철충이 추가로 나타난 건가?

1501400038.english: There have been no such reports yet, but there is a somewhat strange report.
1501400038.korean: 아직까지 그런 보고는 없습니다만, 조금 이상한 보고가 있습니다.

1501400039.english: Reports that our troops suddenly stopped moving and are not moving as if unconscious…
1501400039.korean: 갑자기 돌연 아군이 움직임을 멈추고 마치 의식이 없는 것처럼 움직이지 않는 다는 보고가…

1501400040.english: Wait, I just received a new message.

1501400044.english: Well… according to the report that just came in, the Sisters of Valhalla who went to the battlefield…
1501400044.korean: 그게… 지금 막 들어온 보고로는 전장에 나간 시스터즈 오브 발할라...

1501400045.english: It is said that communication with the entire unit has been cut off…
1501400045.korean: 그 부대 전원과 통신이 끊어졌다고 합니다…

1501400046.english: … My Lord, following the Sisters of Valhalla, communication has been cut off with most of the Steel Line soldiers as well…
1501400046.korean: …주군, 시스터즈 오브 발할라에 이어, 스틸 라인의 병사 대부분과도 통신이 두절되었다고 하오…

1501400047.english: - I slowly lowered my two hands, which I had unconsciously raised high in surging anger, while struggling to restrain myself.
1501400047.korean: - 나는 몰아치는 분노에 무의식으로 높게 들어 올린 두 손을 애써 참으며 천천히 내렸다.

1501400048.english: - Especially in times like this, you must not act emotionally. Right now, you must somehow grasp the situation and deal with it.
1501400048.korean: - 이럴 때일수록 감정적으로 행동하면 안 된다.&n지금은 어떻게 든 상황을 파악하고 대처해야만 한다.

1501400049.english: ...From now on, I will take command, so Lord, please evacuate immediately with your bodyguards.
1501400049.korean: ...지금부터는 소관이 지휘를 맡을 테니 주군은 경호 대원들과 함께 어서 대피하시오.

1501400051.english: My Lord, you know it well! That now is the time to calm your anger and flee!
1501400051.korean: 주군도 잘 알고 계시지 않소!&n지금은 분노를 가라앉히고 몸을 피해야 한다는 것을!

1501400052.english: I cannot lose my lord here!

1501400053.english: My lord is the last remaining human, the only hope!
1501400053.korean: 주군은 마지막 남은 인간, 유일한 희망이란 말이오!

1501400054.english: This is not just my will! It is the will of every Orca member here!
1501400054.korean: 이건 소관만의 뜻이 아니오!&n여기에 있는 모든 오르카 대원의 뜻이오!

1501400056.english: I mean, the fact that my lord would surely find a way to save everyone.
1501400056.korean: 주군이라면 분명, 모두를 구할 수 있는 방법을 찾아낼 거란 사실을 말이요.

1501400057.english: So please, step down for now.

1501400058.english: - I understand it in my head.

1501400059.english: - That it is a completely unexpected crisis situation on a completely different level from what we have seen so far.
1501400059.korean: - 전혀 예상할 수 없었던, 지금까지와는 차원이 다른 위기 상황이라는 것과.

1501400060.english: - Even if I worry about it here and now, there is nothing I can do right away.
1501400060.korean: - 지금 여기서 고민을 한다고 해도 내가 당장 할 수 있는 일은 없다는 걸.

1501400061.english: - As Dragon said, it is right to hide for now and come up with a plan.
1501400061.korean: - 용의 말대로 지금은 몸을 피하고 대책을 세워야 하는 게 맞다.

1501400062.english: - But even knowing that, I can't easily bring myself to leave.
1501400062.korean: - 하지만 그걸 알면서도, 쉽게 발걸음이 떨어지지 않는다.

1501400063.english: Of course. I believe that the lord I know would certainly do so.
1501400063.korean: 물론이요.&n내가 알고 있는 주군이라면 반드시 그리하리라 믿고 있소.

1501400064.english: will somehow manage to request support from Orca. There is communication interference, but I will find a way.
1501400064.korean: 오르카에는 소관이 어떻게든 지원 요청을 해보겠소.&n통신 방해가 있지만, 방법을 찾아보리다.

1501400065.english: We will clear a path so that my lord can evacuate safely, so hurry up during this time.
1501400065.korean: 주군께서 무사히 대피할 수 있도록 우리가 길을 열테니 그 틈에 서두르시오.

1501400066.english: Then, my lord, I wish you good luck.

1501400067.english: What? What are you talking about?

1501400068.english: Kids who aren't too late even now…

1501400069.english: I’ll definitely come back and save everyone.

1501500003.english: - I wonder how far I walked.

1501500004.english: - Breathing is rough, and the taste of blood vibrates in the mouth.
1501500004.korean: - 호흡은 거칠고 입안에서는 피 맛이 진동을 한다.

1501500005.english: - It has been a long time since I could feel anything in my hands and feet due to the bitter cold.
1501500005.korean: - 혹한의 추위에 손발의 감각은 이미 느껴지지 않은 지 오래다.

1501500006.english: - When I came to my senses, there was no one around, and I was the only one desperately running away from the Iron Bugs.
1501500006.korean: - 정신을 차렸을 때는 주위에 아무도 없고, 나 혼자만이 철충으로부터 필사적으로 도망치고 있었다.

1501500007.english: - I don't even know where I am right now or if I'm heading in the right direction.
1501500007.korean: - 지금 내가 어디에 있는지, 제대로 된 방향으로 가고 있는지조차 모르겠다.

1501500008.english: - Who was the last bioroid to escort me? I don't remember clearly.
1501500008.korean: - 마지막으로 날 호위했던 바이오로이드는 누구였지? 잘 기억나지 않는다.

1501500009.english: - I hear the sound of something approaching. It is undoubtedly an Iron Bug.
1501500009.korean: - 무언가 다가오는 소리가 난다. 틀림없이 철충이다.

1501500010.english: - Does that mean… even the bioroid that guarded me until the very end was defeated by the Iron Bug?
1501500010.korean: - 그렇다는 건… 마지막까지 날 호위 했던 바이오로이드마저 철충에게 당했다는 뜻인 걸까.

1501500011.english: - A swarm of Iron Bugs has approached before we knew it and is blocking the path ahead.
1501500011.korean: - 어느새 다가온 철충의 무리가 앞 길을 가로 막고 있다.

1501500012.english: - Did I… make the wrong choice…?

1501500014.english: - The first feeling of defeat. And despair.

1501500015.english: - For some reason, the Iron Bugs don't attack me right away.
1501500015.korean: - 어째서인지 철충들은 나를 바로 공격하지 않는다.

1501500016.english: - Do you intend to toy with me? To make me taste even more despair? Or to see me beg for my life?
1501500016.korean: - 가지고 놀 속셈? 나에게 더욱 절망감을 맛보게 하려고? 아니면 목숨이라도 애걸하는 모습을 보기 위해?

1501500017.english: - Whatever it is, all that remains for me now is death.
1501500017.korean: - 뭐가 됐든 이제 나에게 남은 건 죽음뿐이다.

1501500018.english: - I gave up on everything and slowly closed my eyes.
1501500018.korean: - 나는 모든 걸 체념하고 천천히 눈을 감았다.

1501500023.english: - I am not dead yet. I am alive.

1501500024.english: - As long as I am alive, I can never give up.
1501500024.korean: - 살아 있는 한 절대 포기할 수 없다.

1501500025.english: - Just as they did. They never gave up until the very end.
1501500025.korean: - 그녀들이 그랬던 것처럼. 그녀들은 마지막까지 절대 포기하지 않았다.

1501500026.english: - If I give up here and now, it would be tantamount to trampling on everyone's will.
1501500026.korean: - 내가 지금 여기서 포기하면 모두의 의지를 짓밟는 꼴이 된다.

1501500027.korean: - 그런 일은 절대 있어선 안 된다.

1501500028.english: - For those who have supported me until now
1501500028.korean: - 나를 지금까지 지탱해 준 이들을 위해

1501500029.english: - For those who believe in me and are still fighting
1501500029.korean: - 나를 믿고 여전히 싸우고 있을 이들을 위해

1501500030.english: - To welcome a happy daily life together with everyone
1501500030.korean: - 모두와 함께 행복한 일상을 맞이하기 위해

1501500032.english: Haha, that's it! The Orca Commander!

1501500033.english: - At that moment... a flash of light fell from the sky.

1501500034.english: - The falling flash instantly vaporized the eyes and completely obliterated the surrounding Iron Bugs without a trace.
1501500034.korean: - 떨어진 섬광은 눈을 순식간에 증발 시키며, 주위의 철충들을 흔적도 없이 모조리 박살 냈다.

1501500035.english: - An impact strong enough to shake the ground, as if a giant bomb had been dropped.
1501500035.korean: - 마치 거대한 폭탄이 떨어진 것만 같은 지면이 흔들릴 정도의 충격.

1501500036.english: - Truly devastated, pure destruction that devours everything, a symbol of immense power.
1501500036.korean: - 그야말로 초토화, 모든 것을 집어삼키는 순수한 파괴 거대한 힘의 상징.

1501500037.english: - The majesty possessed only by the strong, showing no trace of weakness.
1501500037.korean: - 나약함 따위는 보이지 않는 오로지 강자만이 갖는 위용.

1501500038.english: - In that place where the flames are soaring fiercely…

1501500039.english: It's been a while, Commander of Orca. Are you still alive?

1501500040.english: Judging by the look in your eyes, it seems you haven't given up yet.
1501500040.korean: 그 눈빛을 보아하니, 아직 포기하지 않은 모양이군.

1501500041.english: Okay, that’s right. That’s the kind of person I like the most.
1501500041.korean: 좋아, 그래야지.&n그래야 내가 제일 좋아하는 인간이지.

1501500043.english: You don't intend to end it like this, do you?

1501500046.english: The struggle of rage you possess!!

1501500047.english: To be continued in Part 2 of <Snowfield at Dawn>…

1501600004.english: I wonder what on earth they came here to do...

1501600005.english: Never mind, now isn't the time to worry about gamma.
1501600005.korean: 됐어, 지금은 감마에 신경 쓸 때가 아니니까.

1501600007.english: As you mentioned, we have invested more resources into strengthening security and guarding across the entire North American region.
1501600007.korean: 말씀하신 대로 북미 지역 전체 보안 및 경비에 자원을 더 투입하여 강화했습니다.

1501600008.english: I instructed Epsilon to position the satellite near North America to block external interference, and I received some of the additional troops promised to Zeta in advance.
1501600008.korean: 엡실론에게는 인공위성을 북미 부근으로 위치하여 외부로부터의 간섭을 차단하라 지시했고,&n제타에게는 지난번 약속 받은 추가 병력의 일부를 먼저 받아왔습니다.

1501600009.english: However, the number of troops is fewer than requested, and it is taking a long time. Considering the number of new factories produced under Omega's instructions, it seems there is a problem, so I am investigating…
1501600009.korean: 그런데 요청했던 것보다 병력의 수가 적고 시간도 오래 걸리고 있습니다.&n오메가님의 지시로 새로 생산한 공장의 수를 생각하면 무슨 문제가 있는 것 같아 조사를…

1501600010.english: You don't need to worry about that part. I'll take care of it.
1501600010.korean: 그 부분은 신경 쓰지 않아도 돼.&n내가 알아서 할 테니까.

1501600011.english: You focus solely on security and guarding the North American region. Make sure not a single rat gets in.
1501600011.korean: 너는 북미 지역의 보안과 경비에만 집중해.&n쥐 새끼 한 마리도 들어오지 못하게.

1501600014.english: I've noticed you've been away from your desk more often lately while I'm out. What are you up to?
1501600014.korean: 요즘 내가 없는 사이 자리를 비우는 횟수가 늘었던데, 뭘 하는 거지?

1501600015.english: Well… just a moment, I went outside for some fresh air…
1501600015.korean: 그게… 잠깐, 바깥바람을 쐬러 나갔다 왔습니다…

1501600016.english: You, who never took a single step out of the server room all year round?
1501600016.korean: 연중 서버실 안에서 한 발짝도 안 나오던 네가?

1501600017.english: Recently... I've just realized that taking a change of scenery occasionally isn't a bad way to boost efficiency, rather than spending time cooped up inside worrying...
1501600017.korean: 최근... 안에 틀어박혀 고민할 시간에 가끔은 기분 전환을 하는 편이 효율을 올리는 데 나쁘지 않다는 걸 알게 된 것뿐입니다...

1501600020.english: When I first saw you, you were like a machine, silently carrying out only the tasks you were instructed to do.
1501600020.korean: 처음 당신을 보았을 때는 지시한 일만 묵묵히 수행하는 기계 같은 아이였는데.

1501600023.english: ...Well, whatever. As long as you do what you're told properly, it doesn't matter.
1501600023.korean: ...뭐, 아무래도 좋아.&n시키는 일만 똑바로 한다면 상관없어.

1501600024.english: I'm going back to San Diego, so just do your job well. Just like you've always done.
1501600024.korean: 나는 다시 샌디에이고로 돌아갈 테니 너는 맡은 일이나 잘해.&n지금까지 그래왔던 것처럼.

1501600029.english: Do you think I've changed, too?

1501600032.english: No, that was a pointless question. Forget about that.

1501600033.english: Phew, it feels like I've ended up like this too because of Gamma. Anyway, I'm off.
1501600033.korean: 후우, 감마 때문에 나까지 어떻게 돼버린 것 같잖아.&n아무튼 난 가보겠어.

1501600036.english: Yes, you have changed... so much...

1501600037.english: So, I'm going to stop it.

1501600038.english: To atone for causing everyone pain…
1501600038.korean: 모두를 고통받게 한 일에 대해 속죄하기 위해서…

1501600039.english: And for Omega's sake as well...

1501600040.english: … Come to think of it, I wonder where Mr. Shepherd is by now.
1501600040.korean: …그러고 보니 셰퍼드 씨는 지금쯤 어디에 계시려나요.

1501600041.english: I wonder if you arrived safely in North America…

1501600042.english: I have no intention of becoming a princess captured in the Demon King's castle, but...
1501600042.korean: 마왕 성에 붙잡힌 공주님이 될 생각은 없지만…

1501600044.english: Welcome to America! North America, I, the Shepherd, have come!
1501600044.korean: 웰컴 투 아메리카!&n북미여, 나 셰퍼드가 왔도다!

1501600046.english: Oh man, this is tough... I'm already completely exhausted just getting here... That Omega, what on earth is she plotting to set up such tight security?
