1501600046.korean: 아이고, 힘들다… 여기까지 오는 데도 벌써 힘이 다 빠졌네…&n오메가 녀석, 대체 무슨 나쁜 짓을 꾸미고 있길래 경비를 철통같이 쳐놓은 거야.

1501600047.english: If I had known this would happen, I should have accepted the Commander's partner support instead of playing hard to get.
1501600047.korean: 이럴 줄 알았으면 튕기지 말고 사령관의 파트너 지원을 받아들일 걸 그랬나.

1501600048.english: Hmm... I was hoping you would hold onto me, even if it meant forcing yourself...
1501600048.korean: 음… 나로서는 억지로라도 붙잡아 주길 바랐는데…

1501600049.english: If I were the commander, I would have knocked her down right away…

1501600050.english: "I will never let you go alone!" she said.
1501600050.korean: 널 절대로 혼자 보내지 않겠어!'라고 했다.

1501600051.english: As expected, you lack masculinity. I hope you've grown a little by the time we meet again.
1501600051.korean: 역시 남자다움이 부족해.&n다음에 다시 만났을 땐 조금은 성장해 있으면 좋겠는데.

1501600054.english: From here on, communication with the outside world is impossible. If you are detected by the enemy even once, it is game over.
1501600054.korean: 여기서부터는 외부와 통신 불가능.&n한번 적에게 발각되면 바로 게임 오버.

1501600055.english: The exact location of the person to be rescued is unknown. In such a situation, having to find the person and safely bring them out...
1501600055.korean: 구출해야 할 대상의 정확한 위치도 알 수 없음.&n그런 상황에서 구출 대상을 찾아 무사히 밖으로 데리고 빠져나와야 한다라…

1501600057.english: It's totally my style! I won't be bored.

1501600058.english: Shall we go rescue Princess Suri Suri Masuri, who has been captured in the Demon King's castle?
1501600058.korean: 어디 마왕 성에 붙잡힌 수리수리 마수리 공주님을 구하러 가보실까?

1501600059.english: English Shepherd! Operation begins now! Go!
1501600059.korean: 잉글리쉬 셰퍼드! 지금부터 작전을 개시한다! 출발!

1501700002.english: (Hmm... what should I do about this...)

1501700003.english: (It was all well and good that you made it inside the building while avoiding the patrolling AGS security guards, but…)
1501700003.korean: (순찰 중인 경비 AGS를 피해 건물 안까지 들어온 것 까진 좋은데…)

1501700007.english: (There are two security ramparts and three pub heads blocking this way.)
1501700007.korean: (이쪽 길을 막고 있는 경비용 램파트가 둘, 펍 헤드가 셋.)

1501700008.english: (...Should we subdue them and break through?)

1501700009.english: (No, there might be other AGS units nearby. If we get caught here, it will become much harder to enter North America.)
1501700009.korean: (아니야, 근처에 다른 AGS가 있을 수도 있어.&n여기서 들키면 북미 내부로 진입하기가 더 어려워지고 말 거야.)

1501700010.english: (Even if it's frustrating, taking the long way around is the right thing to do.)

1501700011.english: (In that case… let’s get out of the village first…)

1501700014.english: (I almost got caught…! Why are there so many guards in such a remote village!)
1501700014.korean: (하마터면 들킬 뻔했네…!&n이런 외진 마을에 왜 이렇게 경비를 많이 세워둔 거야!)

1501700016.english: Checking the interior of the building…

1501700017.english: (What? You're suddenly coming to this building?)

1501700018.english: (Should I escape through the window? But going outside the building is too risky unless I know the drone's location.)
1501700018.korean: (창문을 통해 빠져나갈까?&n하지만 드론의 위치를 모르는 이상 건물 밖으로 나가는 건 너무 리스크가 커.)

1501700019.english: (In that case, it would be better to subdue them quickly…)

1501700022.english: [Ah... it's okay if you don't answer. It would be you who gets into trouble if you made a sound and got caught...]
1501700022.korean: [아... 대답하지 않아도 괜찮아. 괜히 소리를 내었다가 들키면 곤란한 건 너니까...]

1501700023.english: [Since it's a hassle, let me get straight to the point… I'll help you get out of here.]
1501700023.korean: [귀찮으니까 결론부터 말하자면… 내가 빠져나갈 수 있게 도와줄게.]

1501700024.english: It is up to you whether you trust me or not. Personally, I would like you to, though…
1501700024.korean: [나를 믿을지 말지는 네 자유야. 개인적으로 믿어줬으면 좋겠지만…]

1501700025.english: [If you trust me, I will give you a signal. Go out through the back window and enter the house on the right.]
1501700025.korean: [나를 믿는다면 신호를 줄 테니, 뒤쪽 창문으로 빠져나가 오른쪽에 있는 집 안으로 들어가.]

1501700029.english: No abnormalities inside the building… Patrol continues…
1501700029.korean: 건물 내부 이상 없음… 순찰 속행…

1501700030.english: Phew, did I make it through safely?

1501700031.english: [What, are you getting complacent about... We haven't even gotten out of the danger zone yet...]
1501700031.korean: [뭘, 안심하고 있는 거야... 아직 위험구역에서 빠져나가지 못했어...]

1501700032.english: [Next, after 11 seconds, go out the main door and enter the building at the 1 o'clock position. After that, wait 3 seconds, then go out the door near the kitchen and enter the second floor of the building directly in front of you.]
1501700032.korean: [다음은, 11초 뒤에 정문으로 나가서 1시 방향에 있는 건물 안으로 들어가.&n그 뒤에 3초 기다렸다가 주방 쪽에 있는 문으로 나가서 정면에 있는 건물 2층 안으로 들어가야 해.]

1501700035.english: Oh well, whatever! I'll just do it!

1501700036.english: [Next, go up to the rooftop and cross over to the building directly in front. A security AGS is passing under the building, so be careful not to make any noise.]
1501700036.korean: [다음은 옥상으로 올라가서 정면에 있는 건물로 넘어가. 건물 밑에 경비 AGS가 지나가고 있으니까 소리를 내지 않게 조심해.]

1501700037.english: Wow, there are so many orders...

1501700039.english: [Go back inside the building, go straight out the living room window into the alley... and duck down as low as possible to enter the house at the end of the alley.]
1501700039.korean: [다시 건물 안으로 들어가서 곧장 거실 창문을 통해 골목길로 나가… 그리고 최대한 자세를 숙이고 골목길 끝에 있는 집으로 들어가.]

1501700041.english: Phew! What is it this time?

1501700042.english: [Oh, that's amazing. Super fast… Alright, alright, go out the left door, climb the ladder on the right wall, enter through the window of the house on the opposite side, go down to the first floor, and get ready to run at full speed in front of the door. The final goal is the big house directly in front of you… Alright, let’s go… ]
1501700042.korean: [오오, 굉장해. 엄청 빨라… 그럼 그럼 왼쪽 문으로 나가서, 오른쪽 벽에 있는 사다리를 타고 올라간 후, 반대편 집 창문으로 들어가서, 1층으로 내려가 문 앞에서 전력으로 뛸 준비를 해.&n최종 목표는 그 정면에 있는 커다란 집... 자, 고고고고…]

1501700043.english: Aren't you getting a little too excited?
1501700043.korean: 뭔가 너무 신나 하는 거 아니야?

1501700044.english: [Yeah, it’s super fun because it feels like I’m controlling a game character.]
1501700044.korean: [응, 뭔가 게임 캐릭터를 조종하는 것 같아서 엄청 재미있어.]

1501700045.english: It's not fun at all for the one being manipulated...

1501700046.english: [Hmm… I suddenly got curious about what would happen if I got caught by the enemy… Can I give it a try?]
1501700046.korean: [음… 적에게 붙잡히면 어떻게 될지... 갑자기 궁금해졌는데… 해봐도 돼?]

1501700047.english: It's game over! It's hardcore mode with no save/load!
1501700047.korean: 게임 오버 잖아! 세이브 로드도 없는 하드 코어 모드라고!

1501700048.english: Okay, we've entered the big building. What do we do now?
1501700048.korean: 자, 큰 건물 안으로 들어왔어.&n이제 어떻게 하면 돼?

1501700049.english: Move the table in the living room and remove the carpet underneath.
1501700049.korean: [거실에 있는 테이블을 치우고 밑에 깔린 카펫을 치워봐.]

1501700052.english: [This is a passage used by an organization that engaged in illicit trade before the apocalypse. If you use this passage, you can get out of the village.]
1501700052.korean: [멸망 전 암거래하던 조직이 이용하던 통로야.&n이 통로를 이용하면 마을 밖으로 빠져나갈 수 있어.]

1501700053.english: That is, if the passage hadn't collapsed for a hundred years...
1501700053.korean: 통로가 100년이란 세월 동안 무너지지 않았다면 말이지…

1501700054.english: This is all I can do for you right now.
1501700054.korean: [내가 지금 해줄 수 있는 건 여기까지야.]

1501700055.english: … Alright, since I’ve come this far, I’ll hang in there until the very end.
1501700055.korean: …좋아, 이왕 여기까지 온 거 마지막까지 어울려줄게.

1501700056.english: So don't run away either, Mr. Temporary Partner, and take responsibility until the end.
1501700056.korean: 그러니까 너도 어디 도망가지 말고 끝까지 책임지라고 임시 파트너 씨.

1501700058.english: Phew, I finally got out. I never imagined it would actually extend all the way outside the village.
1501700058.korean: 휴, 드디어 빠져나왔네.&n설마 정말로 마을 밖까지 이어져 있을 줄이야.

1501700059.english: [How about this? Now you can trust me a little, right?]
1501700059.korean: [어때, 이걸로 나를 조금은 신용할 수 있게 됐어?]

1501700060.english: If you hadn't trusted me in the first place, we wouldn't have made it this far, you know? Mr. Temporary Partner.
1501700060.korean: 애초에 신용하지 않았으면 여기까지 오지도 않았다고? 임시 파트너 씨.

1501700061.english: So, what is your reason for helping me? You aren't going to say that helping others is your hobby or volunteer work, are you?
1501700061.korean: 그래서, 나를 도와준 이유가 뭐야?&n설마 남을 돕는 게 취미라던가 봉사활동이라고는 하지 않겠지?

1501700062.english: And if possible, I'd like you to show yourself. I know you're watching from close by.
1501700062.korean: 그리고 가능하면 모습을 드러내 줬으면 좋겠는데.&n가까이에서 지켜보고 있다는 거 다 알아.

1501700064.english: [I was planning to meet and talk in person from the beginning anyway.]

1501700065.english: I will give you a coordinate now, so please come there. I'll be waiting for you.
1501700065.korean: [지금부터 좌표를 하나 알려 줄 테니 그곳으로 와줘. 거기서 기다리고 있을게.]

1501700066.english: [I'm telling you in advance, don't be surprised by my appearance... It's not exactly an ordinary look...]
1501700066.korean: [미리 말하지만, 내 모습을 보고 놀라지 마… 평범한 모습은 아니거든…]

1501700067.english: I promise. I'm not going to be surprised that you look a bit unusual now.
1501700067.korean: 약속할게. 이제 와서 모습이 좀 특이하다고 놀랄 생각은 없어.

1501700070.english: Will she be a comrade to rescue the princess together... or one of the Four Heavenly Kings of Evil with a different agenda...
1501700070.korean: 함께 공주님을 구출할 동료일지...&n아니면, 다른 목적을 가진 악의 사천왕 중 하나 일지…

1501800001.english: Hey, I came just as I said.

1501800002.english: It's just an ordinary abandoned building, but is this really the right place?
1501800002.korean: 그냥 평범한 폐 건물인데 정말 여기가 맞나?

1501800003.english: It's over here. It's in this room.

1501800004.english: What the heck, you went to all the trouble of inviting me over just to relax in the master bedroom?
1501800004.korean: 뭐야, 사람을 기껏 불러 놓고 느긋하게 안방에 누워 있는 거야?

1501800006.english: It's so late... I almost fell asleep waiting...

1501800009.english: What's wrong? Why aren't you saying anything?

1501800011.english: Ah… hahahaha, I thought it was something… It’s a drone! Yeah! It’s a drone!
1501800011.korean: 아… 아하하하, 난 또 뭐라고…&n드론이구나! 응! 드론이야!

1501800012.english: I don't feel like I understand at all...

1501800013.english: See? You weren't surprised at all, just as promised?

1501800014.english: Instead, she has a look on her face as if she doesn't understand at all...

1501800015.english: Okay, I expected this kind of reaction.
1501800015.korean: 됐어, 이런 반응일 거라고는 예상하고 있었어.

1501800016.english: It can't be helped. I never imagined a drone would be waiting.
1501800016.korean: 어쩔 수 없잖아.&n설마 드론이 기다리고 있을 거라고는 전혀 상상하지 못했으니까.

1501800017.english: Isn't it a bit underhanded to send a drone when you said you wanted to meet in person?
1501800017.korean: 직접 만나서 이야기 하자고 했으면서 드론을 보내다니 좀 치사하지 않아?

1501800018.english: I am sorry about that. However, I have my own reasons, so please understand.
1501800018.korean: 그건 미안하다고 생각하고 있어.&n하지만 이쪽도 사정이란 게 있으니 이해해줘.

1501800019.english: There is a reason why I’d like you to think of this side as the main body right now. In a way, it is the truth, too...
1501800019.korean: 이유가 있어서 지금은 이쪽이 본체라고 생각해줬으면 좋겠어.&n어떻게 보면 사실이기도 하고…

1501800020.english: So, as you might have guessed, the reason I called you here is because I wanted you to help me...
1501800020.korean: 그래서 이렇게 널 여기로 부른 이유는 예상하고 있겠지만, 날 도와줬으면 해서인데…

1501800021.english: Wait, isn't there something I need to tell you first?
1501800021.korean: 잠깐, 그 전에 먼저 알려줘야 할 게 있지 않아?

1501800023.english: There isn't a single person I know who could help me in the form of a drone.
1501800023.korean: 내가 알고 있는 녀석들 중에서 드론의 모습으로 날 도와줄만한 사람은 전혀 없거든.

1501800024.english: If you intend to give a boring answer saying you can't say it now, I will refuse your request for help.
1501800024.korean: 이제 와서 말할 수 없다는 재미없는 답변을 할 생각이라면 도와달라는 그 부탁은 거절하겠어.

1501800025.english: I am grateful that you saved me from danger. If you need my help, I am also willing to help you.
1501800025.korean: 날 위기에서 구해준 건 고맙게 생각하고 있어.&n내 도움이 필요하다면 나 역시 도와줄 의향도 있고.

1501800026.english: But I'm not kind enough to just say "Ah, I see!" and help someone who isn't revealing their identity.
1501800026.korean: 하지만 자신의 정체를 밝히지 않는 사람을 '아, 그렇군요!' 하고 도와줄 정도로 난 착하지 않아.

1501800028.english: Yeah... I guess there's no need to hide it now...
1501800028.korean: 그렇네… 이제 와서 숨길 필요는 없겠지…

1501800029.english: have been watching you for a long time. Not just you, but Orca, PECS, Iron Bug, and all the affairs on Earth…
1501800029.korean: 오랫동안 널 봐왔어.&n너뿐만이 아니라 오르카도 PECS도 철충도 지상의 모든 일들을…

1501800030.english: Watch over everything on earth…? No way… you…?

1501800031.english: Yawn~ Yeah… My name is Lemonade Epsilon.

1501800032.english: Haha, what should I do... Sorry, Yumi, it looks like it will take a little more time to get to you.
1501800032.korean: 하하, 이걸 어쩐다...&n유미 미안, 아무래도 널 구하러 가는데 조금 더 시간이 걸릴 것 같아.

1501900001.english: So what? What is it that 'Lemonade Epsilon' wants to ask of me? No matter how I think about it, I don't think it's going to be a simple matter.
1501900001.korean: 그래서? 그 '레모네이드 엡실론'이 나한테 요청하고 싶은 일이란 게 뭔데?&n아무리 생각해도 단순한 일은 아닐 거라 보는데.

1501900002.english: Especially considering your generally known position and reputation.
1501900002.korean: 일반적으로 알려진 너의 위치와 평판을 생각한다면 더욱 더 말이지.

1501900003.english: I'll tell you about that gradually as we go. If my prediction is correct, there isn't much time left...
1501900003.korean: 그건 가면서 차차 이야기할게.&n내 예상이 맞는다면 앞으로 시간이 얼마 남지 않았어…

1501900004.english: I have to go to the Detroit industrial complex in Michigan before it's too late.
1501900004.korean: 더 늦기 전에 미시간 주에 있는 디트로이트 공업 단지로 가야 해.

1501900005.english: Detroit!? Hey! How many kilometers do you think it is from here to there!
1501900005.korean: 디트로이트!?&n이봐! 여기서 거기까지 대체 몇 km라고 생각하는 거야!

1501900006.english: Are you saying that if we travel on foot, and do so while avoiding Omega's surveillance, it could easily take a year?
1501900006.korean: 도보로, 그것도 오메가의 감시를 피해 이동한다면 정말로 1년은 우습게 걸릴지도 모른다고?

1501900007.english: Aren't you ignoring me too much...? I'm lemonade too, after all...
1501900007.korean: 나를 너무 무시하는 거 아니야…?&n나도 일단은 레모네이드인데…

1501900008.english: I’ve thought of every possible way. First, please pick me up and move me to the warehouse under this building.
1501900008.korean: 방법이라면 전부 생각해 뒀어.&n우선 나를 들고 이 건물 아래에 있는 창고쪽으로 이동해줘.

1501900010.english: What are you doing? Why aren't you picking me up and moving?
1501900010.korean: 뭐하고 있어? 어서 날 들고 이동하지 않고?

1501900011.english: I've been thinking for a while that it was strange for a drone to just sit there still on the ground...
1501900011.korean: 아까부터 드론 치고 가만히 바닥에 앉아 있는 게 이상하다고는 생각했는데…

1501900012.english: Are you perhaps unable to fly?

1501900013.english: … You're talking nonsense… Can you fly? You can't… That's just how it is…
1501900013.korean: …이상한 소리를 하네…&n그러는 넌 날 수 있어? 못 날잖아… 그런 거야…

1501900014.english: No, even if you say it's just a casual thing... you're a drone right now!
1501900014.korean: 아니, 아무렇지도 않게 그런 거야라고 말해봤자...&n너 지금 드론이잖아!

1501900015.english: It can't be helped... It hasn't been long since I transferred into this body, so I'm not used to it yet... I went through a lot of trouble just to get here...
1501900015.korean: 어쩔 수 없잖아… 아직 이 몸으로 옮긴지 얼마 안 되서 익숙하지가 않은 걸…&n여기까지 오는 데도 엄청 고생했다고…

1501900016.english: bumped into things here and there, so my whole body still aches… Maybe I should have transferred it to something like a Pupp Head instead of a drone…
1501900016.korean: 여기저기 부딪혀서 아직도 전신이 쑤셔…&n드론이 아니라 펍 헤드 같은 거에 옮길 걸 그랬나…

1501900017.english: Enough, just move me already... Or what is it... Is it that you don't want to touch drones that aren't cute?
1501900017.korean: 됐으니까, 어서 날 옮겨줘…&n아니면 뭐야... 귀엽지 않은 드론은 만지고 싶지 않다 그런 거야?

1501900018.english: There are really a lot of orders. I guess it can't be helped...

1501900021.english: Wow… this is comfortable… I like it~ Alright then, let's go~
1501900021.korean: 와… 편하다…&n좋아~ 자, 그럼 렛츠 고~

1501900022.english: …Should I just kick it as I go…

1501900023.english: Whoa, it's so dark I can't see anything!

1501900024.english: There's a shutter over there... so if you open it, the sunlight will come in.
1501900024.korean: 저쪽에 셔터가 있으니까… 열면 햇빛이 들어올 거야.

1501900026.english: I opened it… I wonder what on earth they hid in this warehouse…
1501900026.korean: 열었어… 도대체 이 창고에 뭘 숨겨 놨길래…

1501900028.english: How about this? We should be able to get there quickly with this, right? I think you'll like it.
1501900028.korean: 어때? 이거라면 금방갈 수 있겠지?&n너라면 마음에 들어할거라 생각하는데.

1501900029.english: Haha, you know me really well, don't you?
1501900029.korean: 하하, 날 정말 잘 알고 있잖아?

1501900030.english: Alright! Shall we have a fun run together? Temporary partner!
1501900030.korean: 좋아! 어디 신나게 같이 달려볼까! 임시 파트너!

1501900032.english: I told you... to... please... drive... safely...
1501900032.korean: 안전... 운전으로... 부탁… 한다고… 말했… 는데에에에에에에~

1501900033.english: Hahaha, with such a great car, there’s no way I wouldn’t go all out!
1501900033.korean: 하하하, 이런 훌륭한 차를 두고 내지르지 않는다는 선택지가 있을리 없잖아!

1501900034.english: It's been so long since I've driven a Humvee!

1501900035.english: Wow~ It's been a while since I've been this fired up!

1501900036.english: Why are you burning up on your own?

1501900037.english: Stop being such a crybaby! You should know how to enjoy this much with ease!
1501900037.korean: 엄살은~ 이 정도는 어유롭게 즐길 줄 알아야지!

1501900038.english: Not to mention my ex-partner, Sadius—I even gave Cerberus a ride once in a while, and she said she had a blast?
1501900038.korean: 내 전 파트너인 사디어스는 물론이고 가끔 켈베로스를 태웠는데 엄청 신나했다고?

1501900039.english: Beta... um... was Beta okay back then? I think she might have fainted?
1501900039.korean: 베타는… 음…&n그때 베타가 괜찮았던가? 기절했었던 것 같기도 하고?

1501900040.english: Anyway, if you want to be my partner, just bear with it!

1501900041.english: I'm telling you, I have no intention of being your partner~~ Ah! Ahead! Ahead! Slow downtttttt~~
1501900041.korean: 난 네 파트너가 될 생각이 없단 말이야~~&n앗! 앞! 앞! 속도 좀 줄여어어어~~

1501900042.english: Not yet! This guy can show you even more!
1501900042.korean: 아직 멀었어! 이 녀석이라면 더 보여줄 수 있다고!

1501900043.english: It's okay... you don't have to show me that kind of thing~

1501900044.english: And… you mustn’t go anywhere other than where I mark!
1501900044.korean: 그리고… 내가 표시하는 곳 이외로는 가면 안 돼에에에~

1501900045.english: Because there is a limit to… deceiving… Omega’s surveillance…
1501900045.korean: 오메가의 감시를… 속이는 것도… 한계가 있으니까아아아아아~

1501900046.english: Haha! Great! Great! Then shall we go for it with peace of mind?
1501900046.korean: 하하! 좋아! 좋아! 그럼 마음 놓고 달려볼까!

1501900047.english: Opportunities like this don't come often!

1501900048.english: Oh, look, there's the perfect corner over there!
1501900048.korean: 오, 저쪽에 마침 딱 좋은 코너가 있잖아?

1501900049.english: Hold on tight, temporary partner! I'm going to show you an awesome drift!
1501900049.korean: 꽉 잡고 있으라고 임시 파트너!&n내가 아주 끝내주는 드리프트를 보여줄 테니까!

1501900050.english: So… it’s okay if you don’t show me that… .. Hiyyyyyyyyyyyy~
1501900050.korean: 그러니까… 그런 거 안 보여 줘도 괜찮….. 히야아아아아아아~

1501900051.english: One more time! It's a double drift!!

1501900053.english: Ahaha, was that a bit too much...

1501900054.english: It’s a shame, but from here on, we have nothing but straight ahead for the time being, so it’ll be fine.
1501900054.korean: 아쉽지만 여기서부터는 당분간 직진밖에 없으니까 괜찮을 거야.

1501900055.english: I don't feel… regret at all… I thought I was going to die… I’m never going to ride in a car again for the rest of my life…
1501900055.korean: 전혀… 아쉽지 않아… 죽는 줄 알았어… 앞으로 평생 차 같은건 다시는 타지 않을 거야…

1501900056.english: That's a shame~ Well, I guess it might have been a bit too intense for the indoor type.
1501900056.korean: 그거 아쉬운데~&n뭐, 인도어 파에게는 자극이 좀 심했으려나.

1501900057.english: So, let's get to the point...

1501900058.english: Tell me what I need to help with.
1501900058.korean: 말해줘, 내가 도와줘야 하는 일이 무엇인지.

1501900059.english: I'll let you know in advance that I have a goal to rescue Yumi, who is working as a spy for Omega.
1501900059.korean: 미리 말해두겠는데 나에겐 오메가 쪽에 스파이로 있는 유미를 구출한다는 목적이 있어.

1501900060.english: So far, I’m on the same path as my original destination, but honestly, going all the way to Detroit is a huge burden.
1501900060.korean: 아직까지는 본래 가려던 목적지와 같은 길이지만, 솔직히 디트로이트까지 가는 건 부담이 커.

1501900061.english: Depending on the situation, even if I don't refuse your request, I can postpone it.
1501900061.korean: 내용에 따라서 네 부탁을 거절하지 않는다 해도 뒤로 미룰 수는 있어.

1501900062.english: What on earth is in Detroit? And what is your objective?
1501900062.korean: 디트로이트에는 대체 뭐가 있는 거지?&n그리고 너의 목적은 뭐야.

1501900064.english: … Detroit is where Zeta's home base is hidden.

1501900066.english: Yeah, Zeta built her own secret factory underground there that she didn't even tell our Lemonade about.
1501900066.korean: 응, 제타는 그곳 지하에 우리 레모네이드 조차 알리지 않은 자신의 비밀 공장을 건설했어.

1501900067.english: It took decades just to figure this out...

1501900068.english: Are you saying you're plotting something there... no, making something?
1501900068.korean: 그곳에서 무언가를 꾸미고… 아니, 무언가를 만들고 있다는 거야?

1501900069.english: I don't know exactly what I'm making either.
1501900069.korean: 정확히 만들고 있는 게 무엇인지는 나도 몰라.

1501900070.english: Lately, massive... truly massive resources have been continuously transported to Detroit. The reason I was able to discover the factory is because I found traces of it.
1501900070.korean: 최근 들어 막대한… 정말 막대한 자원이 계속해서 디트로이트로 이송되고 있어.&n내가 공장을 발견할 수 있었던 이유도 그 흔적을 찾았기 때문이야.

1501900071.english: Wait, the fact that you are gathering resources even at the risk of revealing the location of a factory you haven't been able to find for decades to the outside world...
1501900071.korean: 잠깐, 네가 수십 년 동안 찾을 수 없었던 공장의 위치를, 외부에 알리게 될지도 모르면서까지 자원을 모으고 있다는 건…

1501900072.english: Right, I suppose it can be interpreted to mean there is no longer a need to hide it... It's almost finished... or maybe it's already complete...
1501900072.korean: 맞아, 더 이상 숨길 필요가 없다는 뜻으로 해석할 수 있겠지...&n거의 다 완성했거나… 어쩌면 이미 완성된 상태일 수도 있을 테고…

1501900073.english: I don't know what Zeta's purpose is, but... if I give her any more time, the possibility that it will hinder me from achieving my goal also increases...
1501900073.korean: 제타의 목적이 뭔지는 몰라도… 이 이상 시간을 주게 되면 내 목적을 이루는데 지장이 생길 가능성도 함께 높아져…

1501900074.english: And this isn't good news for you Orca either…
1501900074.korean: 그리고 이건 너희 오르카에게도 좋은 소식은 아닐 거야…

1501900075.english: I think we need to figure out at least Zeta's purpose and the true nature of what they are creating before it's too late to come up with a plan. What do you think?
1501900075.korean: 더 늦기 전에 적어도 제타의 목적과 만들고 있는 것의 정체를 파악해야지 대책을 세울 수 있을 거라고 생각하는데 어때?

1501900077.english: An emergency quest suddenly butting in during the main quest... just how hardcore is this...
1501900077.korean: 메인 퀘스트 중에 갑자기 끼여든 긴급 퀘스트라니… 얼마나 하드 코어한 거냐고…

1501900078.english: Please answer just one more thing.

1501900079.english: Epsilon, what is this goal you have to achieve even to the point of asking me for help?
1501900079.korean: 엡실론, 나에게 도움을 요청하면서까지 이뤄야 하는 너의 목적이란 게 뭐야?

1501900081.english: I just want to get it back... So please, I beg you, help me...
1501900081.korean: 나는 그저 되찾고 싶을 뿐이야…&n그러니까 부탁할게, 도와줘...

1501900082.english: Getting my body back that was stolen by Zeta…
1501900082.korean: 제타에게 빼앗긴 내 몸을 되찾는 걸…

1502000002.english: Labiata? What are you worrying about so much?
1502000002.korean: 라비아타 언니?&n무슨 고민을 그렇게 하고 계세요?

1502000005.english: It’s not nothing at all. Do you think I’ve seen Labiata’s worried face until now?
1502000005.korean: 아무것도 아니긴요.&n제가 지금까지 라비아타 언니가 고민하는 얼굴을 얼마나 봐 왔다고 생각하세요?

1502000006.english: It’s the same expression as when you’re trying to resist eating a dessert before a regular medical checkup.
1502000006.korean: 마치 정기 검진을 앞두고 먹고 싶은 디저트를 참고 있을 때와 같은 표정이에요.

1502000007.english: What? Am I really making that face right now?
1502000007.korean: 뭐? 내가 정말 지금 그런 표정을 하고 있니?

1502000008.english: Hehehe, I'm just kidding. Back then, I would make a slightly more pitiful expression like this.
1502000008.korean: 우후후, 농담이에요.&n그때는 좀 더 이렇게, 보기에 안타까운 표정을 짓지요.

1502000009.english: Constantia... you've changed so much. You can even crack jokes with your older sister now.
1502000009.korean: 콘스탄챠… 많이 달라졌구나.&n이제 언니한테 농담도 할 수 있게 되고.

1502000010.english: My older sister created me and taught me everything. In the past, Labiata was my whole world.
1502000010.korean: 언니는 절 만들어 주시고, 제게 모든 걸 가르쳐 주셨죠.&n예전의 저에게는 라비아타 언니가 세상의 전부였어요.

1502000011.english: However, after meeting my Master and being with the other bioroids, I learned so much.
1502000011.korean: 하지만 주인님을 만나고 다른 바이오로이드 분들과 함께하면서&n정말 많은 걸 배우게 됐지요.

1502000012.english: Now, I have gained not only my older sister but also so many other precious things.
1502000012.korean: 지금의 저에게는 언니뿐만이 아니라 다른 소중한 것들이 잔뜩 생겼어요.

1502000013.english: Hehehe, seeing my younger sibling grow up so wonderfully, I feel a sense of regret on the one hand.
1502000013.korean: 우후후, 이렇게 훌륭하게 성장한 동생을 보고 있자니 한편으로는 아쉬움이 남는 것 같구나.

1502000014.english: It feels like just yesterday I was changing Constantia's diapers...
1502000014.korean: 콘스탄챠의 기저귀를 갈아주던 시절이 엊그제 같은데…

1502000015.english: Labiata unnie!? You've never changed my diaper! No, actually, I've never worn a diaper in the first place!
1502000015.korean: 라비아타 언니!? 제 기저귀를 갈아주신 적 없으시잖아요!&n아니, 애초에 저는 기저귀를 찬 적이 없어요!

1502000016.english: Hehehe, I was just joking. Think of it as revenge for what happened a moment ago.
1502000016.korean: 우후후, 나도 농담이란다.&n조금 전의 복수라고 생각하렴.

1502000017.english: Yeah, come to think of it the way you said, I've also gained a lot of precious things...
1502000017.korean: 그래, 네 말대로 생각해 보면 나 역시 소중한 것들이 잔뜩 생겼지…

1502000018.english: As expected, you were worried about Master.

1502000020.english: understand your concern, Labiata. I, too, am hoping for Master's safe return.
1502000020.korean: 라비아타 언니의 걱정은 이해가 돼요.&n저 역시 주인님이 무사히 돌아오기만을 바라고 있으니까요.

1502000021.english: Master often displays reckless behavior as usual, but this time it will be fine since he is with many other members.
1502000021.korean: 주인님은 언제나 그렇듯 무모한 행동을 자주 보여주시지만, 이번에는 다른 많은 대원분과 함께니까 괜찮을 거예요.

1502000023.english: I want to personally verify every single piece of information without missing anything, for the upcoming battle against the Iron Bug.
1502000023.korean: 앞으로 있을 철충과의 싸움을 위해, 작은 정보 하나라도 놓치지 않고 직접 확인하고 싶다고.

1502000024.english: In the end, Master is always working tirelessly for us.
1502000024.korean: 결국 주인님은 언제나 저희를 위해 몸을 아끼지 않고 움직여주고 계시는 거예요.

1502000025.english: You sent Master because you knew that, didn't you?
1502000025.korean: 언니도 그걸 알기 때문에 주인님을 보내주신 거잖아요?

1502000026.english: Uhuhu, right. That is precisely why he is our master—because there is an unavoidable side to him.
1502000026.korean: 우후후, 그래.&n어쩔 수 없는 그런 부분이 있기 때문에 바로 우리들의 주인님이시지.

1502000027.english: Labiata! Are you free right now?

1502000029.english: There is something I'd like you to take a look at. Can you come to my lab right now?
1502000029.korean: 봐주었으면 하는 게 있는데 지금 내 연구실로 와줄 수 있어?

1502000030.english: Oh, Labiata, and Constantia, come on over too.
1502000030.korean: 앗, 라비아타 언니, 콘스탄챠 언니도 어서 와.

1502000031.english: Hehe, you seem really excited. Did you find a new research subject?
1502000031.korean: 후후, 많이 흥분한 것 같은데 새로운 연구 대상이라도 찾았니?

1502000032.english: Hehehe~ Yeah, that's right. Look at the screen here.

1502000033.english: A screen? Is this... an AGS being infected by Iron Bug?

1502000034.english: Yeah, a few hours ago, Merope, who is on the northern front, sent me this data asking me to investigate.
1502000034.korean: 응, 몇 시간 전에 북부 전선에 나가 있는 메로페가 나에게 조사해달라며 이 데이터를 보내줬어.

1502000035.english: It would have been better if I could have seen it with my own eyes... but for now, I'll have to make do with this.
1502000035.korean: 눈으로 직접 볼 수 있었다면 더 좋았겠지만... 지금은 이걸로 참아야지.

1502000036.english: The fact that they sent it from over there... could it be that our Orca's AGS is infected with Iron Bug?
1502000036.korean: 저쪽에서 보내줬다는 건… 설마 우리 오르카의 AGS가 철충에 감염된 거니?

1502000037.english: No, do you see this part of the circuit here? It's different from the circuit we use. This AGS is the PECS AGS.
1502000037.korean: 아니야, 여기 이 부분 회로 보이지? 우리가 쓰는 회로랑 다르잖아.&n이 AGS는 PECS의 AGS야.

1502000039.english: Wait, as far as I know, PECS's AGS is also safe from Iron Bug infection...
1502000039.korean: 잠깐, 내가 알기로는 PECS의 AGS도 철충의 감염에는 안전하다고 알고 있는데…

1502000040.english: Then doesn't that mean there is a risk that our Orca's AGS could also be infected by Iron Bug?
1502000040.korean: 그럼 우리 오르카의 AGS도 철충에 감염될 우려가 있다는 뜻이 아니니?

1502000041.english: No. This AGS is infected by Iron Bug because its erosion immunity circuit isn't functioning properly.
1502000041.korean: 아니야. 이 AGS가 철충에 감염된 건 침식면역회로가 정상적으로 작동하고 있지 않아서야.

1502000042.english: If it had been functioning normally, it wouldn't have been infected by Iron Bugs.
1502000042.korean: 정상적으로 작동하고 있었다면 철충에 감염되지 않았을 거야.

1502000044.english: Hahaha, Doctor, will you please tell us why you called us?
1502000044.korean: 후후후, 닥터 이제 그만 우리를 부른 이유를 말해주겠니?

1502000045.english: What I want Labiata to look after isn't the AGS, but this Iron Bug.
1502000045.korean: 내가 라비아타 언니에게 봐주었으면 하는 건 AGS가 아니라 이 철충 쪽이야.

1502000047.english: Yeah, I would need to examine it in person and conduct a thorough inspection, but based on the current data, I have reached one conclusion.
1502000047.korean: 응, 자세한 건 직접 만져보고 정밀 검사를 해야 하겠지만,&n지금의 데이터 자료로 판단했을 때 나는 한 가지 결론에 도달했어.

1502000048.english: Yeah, no doubt about it. This Iron Bug is an artificial Iron Bug created by someone.
1502000048.korean: 응, 틀림없어 확실해.&n이 철충은 인공적으로 누군가에 의해 만들어진 인공 철충이야.

1502000049.english: You mean it was made artificially?

1502000050.english: At first glance, it looks exactly like a real Iron Bug, but when you look at its internal structure, it is clearly different from a real Iron Bug.
1502000050.korean: 언뜻 보기에는 진짜 철충이랑 똑같이 생겼지만, 내부 구조로 보았을 때 진짜 철충과는 명백하게 다르거든.

1502000051.english: But as you can see, it seems the function of infecting AGS is equally possible.
1502000051.korean: 하지만 보다시피 AGS를 감염시키는 기능은 똑같이 가능한가 봐.

1502000052.english: I never even imagined making artificial Iron Bugs. Who on earth made something like this?
1502000052.korean: 인공 철충을 만드는 건 나는 지금까지 생각도 못 했는데 대체 누가 이런 걸 만든 걸까.

1502000053.english: Not long ago, when my brother came back after getting into trouble this summer, I heard that they discovered an Iron Bug at a certain facility that couldn't detect human brainwaves. Could this Iron Bug be one that was created exactly like the one from back then...
1502000053.korean: 얼마 전, 여름에 오빠가 사고 치고 돌아왔을 때 어떤 시설에서 인간의 뇌파가 느껴지지 않는 철충을 발견했다고 들었는데, 혹시 이 철충이 그때와 똑같이 만들어진 철충일지도…

1502000055.english: Doctor, could this Iron Bug possibly infect a Bioroid?
1502000055.korean: 닥터, 혹시 이 철충이 바이오로이드를 감염시킬 수도 있을까?

1502000056.english: Bioroids? The Iron Bug only have AGS equipped with AI circuits… No, um, that’s right…
1502000056.korean: 바이오로이드를?&n철충은 AI 회로가 탑재된 AGS만을… 아니, 음, 그렇네…

1502000057.english: Since this Iron Bug was created artificially, if you think about it being modified to forcibly attempt infection... there was also the case where my brother got infected...
1502000057.korean: 이 철충은 인공적으로 만들어졌으니까 강제로 감염을 시도하도록 개조되었다 생각하면...&n오빠가 감염됐었던 경우도 있었고…

1502000058.english: Theoretically, even if a complete infection is impossible, it might be possible to affect the bioroids to some extent.
1502000058.korean: 이론상 완전한 감염까지는 무리더라도 어느 정도 바이오로이드에게 영향을 주는 정도는 가능할지도 몰라.

1502000059.english: I'll give this a proper look into it!
1502000059.korean: 나, 한 번 제대로 조사해 볼게!

1502000060.english: Thank you, I'll leave it to you.

1502000063.english: Lady Labiata! I'm so glad you were here!

1502000064.english: What's wrong? With such a frantic look.

1502000065.english: It has been a long time since the regular contact should have come from the northern front where Master is, but we still haven't received any word.
1502000065.korean: 주인님이 계시는 북부 전선에서 정기 연락이 와야 하는 시간이 한참이나 지났는데,&n아직도 아무런 연락이 오지 않고 있어요.

1502000066.english: The thing is, even if I try to contact you from this side, the communication isn't connecting...
1502000066.korean: 이쪽에서 연락을 해보려고 해도 통신이 연결되지 않는 게…

1502000067.english: … I think something happened to Master.
1502000067.korean: …아무래도 주인님께 무슨 일이 생긴 것 같아요.

1502000070.english: Hurry up and recruit commanders. And tell Aeda to check the North using a satellite.
1502000070.korean: 서둘러 지휘관들을 모집해 줘.&n그리고 에이다에게는 인공위성으로 북부를 확인해달라고 전해 줘.

1502000072.english: Mr. Alpha, did Master take that 'that thing' with him?
1502000072.korean: 알파 씨, 주인님께서 예의 '그건' 가지고 가셨나요?

1502000073.english: Yes, together with Azaz, we somehow managed to complete one and hand it over.
1502000073.korean: 네, 아자즈와 함께 어떻게든 하나를 완성해서 건네드렸어요.

1502000074.english: But considering Master's personality... I wonder if he will actually use it...
1502000074.korean: 하지만 주인님의 성격을 생각하면... 과연 사용하실지…

1502000075.english: Unless it is an emergency, you wouldn't use it even if you were forced to, right?
1502000075.korean: 위급한 상황이 아니라면 억지로라도 사용하지 않으시겠죠.

1502000076.english: … It will be alright. I know your strength better than anyone.
1502000076.korean: …괜찮을 거예요.&n주인님의 강함은 누구보다 제가 잘 알고 있으니까요.

1502100003.english: - was definitely… attacked by a swarm of Iron Bugs…

1502100004.english: … My Lord, following the Sisters of Valhalla, communication has been cut off with most of the Steel Line soldiers as well…
1502100004.korean: …주군, 시스터즈 오브 발할라에 이어, 스틸 라인의 병사 대부분과도 통신이 두절되었다고 하오…

1502100005.english: ...From now on, I will take command, so Lord, please evacuate immediately with your bodyguards.
1502100005.korean: ...지금부터는 소관이 지휘를 맡을 테니 주군은 경호 대원들과 함께 어서 대피하시오.

1502100007.english: We will clear a path so that my lord can evacuate safely, so hurry up during this time.
1502100007.korean: 주군께서 무사히 대피할 수 있도록 우리가 길을 열 테니 그 틈에 서두르시오.

1502100008.english: Then, my lord, I wish you good luck.

1502100010.english: Do not worry, Your Excellency. Our Steel Line unit is not afraid to fight for you under any circumstances.
1502100010.korean: 걱정하지 마십시오, 각하.&n저희 스틸 라인 부대는 그 어떤 상황에서도 각하를 위해 싸우는 걸 두려워하지 않으니까요.

1502100012.english: Steel Line Unit! We will defend this front line with all our might so that His Excellency can escape safely! Do not let a single one pass!
1502100012.korean: 스틸 라인 부대! 각하께서 무사히 빠져나갈 수 있도록 전력을 다해 이 전선을 반드시 지킨다!&n한 마리도 지나가게 하지 마라!

1502100015.english: Yes! Sister! But… Hachiko and Fenrir who were following behind…

1502100019.english: Leave this to me, and you escort Master safely to the ship.
1502100019.korean: 여기는 나에게 맡기고 너는 주인님을 함선까지 안전하게 모셔.

1502100020.english: Then, what about you, big sister…! … Understood! As your master’s bodyguard, I will definitely protect you!
1502100020.korean: 그럼 언니는…!&n…알겠어요, 주인님의 경호 대원으로서 반드시 지킬게요!

1502100022.english: Master, following your commands is my happiness.
1502100022.korean: 주인님, 저는 주인님의 명령을 따르는 게 제 행복입니다.

1502100023.english: But a greater happiness than that is protecting my master.
1502100023.korean: 하지만 그것보다 더 큰 행복은 바로 주인님을 지키는 거예요.

1502100025.english: I will definitely protect my master!!

1502100033.english: - I woke up with a throbbing headache.
1502100033.korean: - 지끈거리는 두통과 함께 나는 정신이 깨어났다.

1502100034.english: - My whole body felt heavy, as if pressed down by something, and I could not move as I intended, even when I tried.
1502100034.korean: - 전신이 무언가에 짓눌린 것처럼 무겁고 움직이려고 해도 뜻대로 움직여지지 않았다.

1502100035.english: - That was a dream just now...? Did I lose consciousness without realizing it... Where am I...
1502100035.korean: - 방금 건 꿈…?&n모르는 사이 정신을 잃었나… 여기는 어디지…

1502100036.english: Hmm, are you coming to your senses?

1502100037.english: You seemed to be having quite a nightmare; you must have had a bad dream.
1502100037.korean: 상당히 가위에 눌리던데 기분 나쁜 꿈이라도 꿨나 보군.

1502100038.english: - The voice of 'someone' heard from quite close by.

1502100039.english: - It seems someone was protecting me while I was unconscious.
1502100039.korean: - 아무래도 정신을 잃은 사이 누군가가 나를 보호하고 있던 모양이다.

1502100040.english: - I slowly opened my eyes, pushing aside my heavy eyelids to see the owner of the voice.
1502100040.korean: - 나는 목소리의 주인을 보기 위해 무거운 눈꺼풀을 밀어내며 천천히 눈을 떴다.

1502100041.english: - Perhaps because I had lost consciousness, I could not handle the sudden influx of light, and only a blurry vision was faintly visible.
1502100041.korean: - 정신을 잃었던 탓인지 갑자기 들어오는 빛을 감당하지 못했고, 흐릿한 시야만이 어렴풋이 보일 뿐이었다.

1502100042.english: Hey, now that you've opened your eyes, say something.
1502100042.korean: 이봐, 눈을 떴으면 무슨 말이라도 해보라고.

1502100043.english: You didn't hurt your head, did you?

1502100044.english: - Who is talking to me? It's a voice I recognize, but...
1502100044.korean: - 말을 걸고 있는 건 누구지? 알고 있는 목소리이긴 한데…
